GeneratedRecipe: put berries in a saucepan with sugar and cornstarch. blend in water and salt. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. remove from heat. add butter and mix well. cool. add berries and mix well. pour into cooled crust. chill for 2 to 3 hours. top with whipped cream before serving.

Ingredients: 1 (9 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, melted, 6 (1 oz.) sq. unsweetened chocolate, 6 c. powdered sugar, 2 tsp. vanilla, dash of salt, nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Let cream cheese set at room temperature. Add sugar to cream cheese and cream together. Add melted chocolate, vanilla, salt and nuts (if desired). Press fudge into buttered 9 x 13-inch pan and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: combine first 4 ingredients in a bowl. mix thoroughly. add sugar and salt. mix well. add vanilla. mix well. drop on waxed paper. chill 2 hours. store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 4 Idaho potatoes, baked, 3 Tbsp. butter, melted, salt, garlic powder and paprika to taste, bacon bits
ReferenceRecipe: Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Scoop out the insides and serve as mashed potatoes, leaving 1/4-inch of potato to the shell. Halve shells lengthwise. On baking sheet, brush skins with butter and sprinkle lightly with salt, garlic powder, bacon bits and paprika. Broil until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Makes 16 potato snacks.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and slice potatoes. place in buttered casserole. sprinkle with salt and garlic powder. dot with butter. sprinkle with paprika and paprika.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. Velveeta cheese, 1 (10 oz.) can Rotel tomatoes with green chiles
ReferenceRecipe: Pour Rotel tomatoes into medium saucepan: add cheese. Cook over low heat; serve with favorite chips.
GeneratedRecipe: melt cheese and tomatoes in microwave. serve warm with chips.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 4 sq. unsweetened chocolate, 2 c. sugar, 4 eggs, 2 tsp. vanilla, 2 c. flour, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix oil, chocolate and sugar. Blend in one egg at a time until well mixed. Add vanilla. Measure flour, baking powder and salt; stir into oil mixture. Chill several hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate and chocolate. cool. in large bowl, mix flour, baking powder and salt. add sugar, oil and vanilla. beat until smooth. add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition.

Ingredients: 1 box pistachio pudding, 1 container Cool Whip, 1/2 c. pecans, 1 can crushed pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dry pudding and pineapple. Add Cool Whip and pecans. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. refrigerate. serve.

Ingredients: 2 slices bacon, 1 large green pepper, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1 large red pepper, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1 large yellow peppers, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1/4 tsp. oregano leaves, 2 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley
ReferenceRecipe: In a large skillet, saute bacon until crisp. Break up into small pieces and drain! Save drippings. Add peppers and oregano to skillet. Cook until tender. Stir in bacon. Season and sprinkle with parsley. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: place bacon strips on a paper towel; cover with paper towel. microwave at high for 2 minutes or until softened. remove bacon from skillet and reserve drippings. add peppers, bacon and parsley. saute 1 minute. add remaining ingredients; mix well.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 2 eggs, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1/2 c. cocoa, 2/3 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. baking powder
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in bowl. Beat at low speed for 2 minutes. Spread into greased pan and bake 25 minutes. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: mix first 5 ingredients in a large mixing bowl. in a large mixing bowl, combine eggs, oil and vanilla. add to first mixture and beat until smooth. add flour mix until smooth. stir in nuts. pour in greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan; bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes or until done.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. chocolate cookie crumbs, 1 1/2 pt. vanilla ice cream, 1/4 c. butter, 1/4 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Roll thin chocolate wafers with a rolling pin to make crumbs. Cream the butter; add crumbs and sugar; blend thoroughly. Cover crumbs with ice cream, packing down well. Press remaining crumbs firmly on top. Garnish with whipped cream. Return to refrigerator to freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: mix and press into a 9-inch pie plate. cover with cookie crumbs. top with ice cream and freeze.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 can condensed milk, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 1 graham cracker crust
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cream cheese, condensed milk and lemon juice together and pour into graham cracker crust. Chill and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: blend cream cheese and milk. add lemon juice and mix. pour in pie crust and chill overnight or longer.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. corn bread mix (Martha White Cotton Pickin corn bread mix), 2 large tomatoes, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/2 c. bell pepper, chopped, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Cook corn bread mix like package says. Let it cool. Crumble up. Put in large bowl and mix all ingredients together. Let set in the refrigerator several hours before serving. Keep in covered dish in refrigerator until eaten.
GeneratedRecipe: cook corn bread mix according to package directions. cool. crumble and mix with corn bread mix and mayonnaise. add vegetables and mix well. spread in greased casserole. cover top with chopped tomato, crumbled, crumbled bacon, chopped fine.

Ingredients: 6 c. peeled zucchini, chopped fine or grated, 1 can crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 6 c. sugar, 2 pkg. apricot jello (3 oz. size)
ReferenceRecipe: Boil zucchini 6 minutes and drain well. Add pineapple, lemon juice and sugar. Boil all together 10 minutes, then add jello. Mix well.	Ladle into jars. Put wax on top or put flats and rings on and they will seal. Tastes a lot like apricot jam.
GeneratedRecipe: cook zucchini and lemon juice together for 6 minutes. add sugar. boil 3 minutes. add jello, stirring until dissolved. pour in sterile jars and seal.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1 c. powdered sugar, 2 Tbsp. milk, 4 oz. Cool Whip, chocolate flavored crumb pie shell or graham cracker shell, chocolate flavored syrup (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: In large mixer bowl, combine cream cheese and peanut butter, beat with electric mixer until combined. Add powdered sugar and milk, beat until combined. Fold in whipped topping. GeneratedRecipe: combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, peanut butter and milk in medium bowl. mix until smooth. fold in cool whip. pour in crust. chill until firm. top with chocolate shavings.

Ingredients: 24 whole graham crackers, 1 large box instant vanilla pudding mix, 1 c. lite cool whip, 1/2 can lite chocolate frosting
ReferenceRecipe: Make pudding with skim milk according to package directions. Fold in cool whip. In 13x9 pan layer 8 whole graham crackers; top with one half the pudding mixture. GeneratedRecipe: line a 13 x 9-inch pan with graham crackers. prepare vanilla pudding with 2 cups milk according to package directions and add cool whip. spread over crackers. spread frosting over top of crackers. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 2 lb. powdered sugar, 1 can canned milk, 1/2 lb. oleo, 1/2 tsp. cornstarch, 10 1/2 oz. small marshmallows, 2 c. peanut butter (creamy)*
ReferenceRecipe: Stir constantly first 4 ingredients until boiling; boil (full rolling) for 7 minutes. In a large mixing bowl, combine marshmallows and peanut butter. Pour hot mixture over marshmallows and beat with mixer until well blended. Pour into buttered cookie sheet. Let cool and cut.
GeneratedRecipe: * can be used in place of peanut butter and powdered sugar.

Ingredients: 2 lb. ground beef or veal, 1/4 c. onion flakes, 2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper, 1/4 c. parsley, 2 Tbsp. green peppers, 1 small ball gargel
ReferenceRecipe: Mix and make small balls. Brown in skillet.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef. add all other ingredients and cook until tender. serve on bread and top with grated cheese.

Ingredients: 20 oz. pkg. Oreos, crushed, 1 Tbsp. butter, melted, 1/2 gal. vanilla ice cream, 2 jars hot fudge, 1 large container Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix Oreos with melted butter (save 1 ounce without butter). Spread Oreos in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Press firmly in pan. Spread softened vanilla ice cream over Oreos. Spread 2 jars hot fudge on top of ice cream, saving some hot fudge for garnish. Spread Cool Whip over hot fudge. To garnish, sprinkle 1 ounce Oreos and drizzle remaining hot fudge on top of Cool Whip. Cut into squares to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix oreos and melted butter together and press in 9 x 13-inch pan. soften ice cream with mixer. spread on oreos. spread cool whip over ice cream. freeze until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. cocoa, 1/4 c. butter, 1/4 c. milk, 1 c. sugar, pinch of salt
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients and boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat. Beat until creamy enough to spread.
GeneratedRecipe: put all ingredients into a heavy saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until soft ball forms in cold water. remove from heat. pour over ice cold cake.

Ingredients: 2 slices sandwich bread, 1/2 Tbsp. butter, margarine or spread, 2 tsp. jam or jelly (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Plug in toaster to most convenient electric outlet. Place bread slices into slots on top of toaster (one in each slot). Press down on handle in front of toaster. Use knife to apply other ingredients as desired.
GeneratedRecipe: spread 1 side of bread with jelly spread. cut bread lengthwise into 8 wedges. place a slice on a baking sheet. melt butter in a small microwave on high ( 50 % ). add jam. cook on roast for 8 to 10 minutes, turning once or twice during cooking. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 chicken, 1 c. dry white wine, water, 1 large onion, chopped, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken in large stock pot with enough water to cover. Add wine; put on lid. Bring to a boil. Scrape off any scum that may form. Strain the stock into containers. This will keep for 3 to 4 weeks in refrigerator. Can be frozen. Makes about 1 gallon.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large pot, place the onion and chicken pieces on the bottom. sprinkle with salt and pepper. add the wine. pour the 1 cup of water over the chicken; cover and cook on low heat for about 45 to 50 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. Tang, 1/4 c. lemon and sugar tea mix (instant), 1/2 tsp. cloves, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: To Use: 2 teaspoons mix to 1 cup hot or cold water.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients. store in a tightly covered jar. to serve, add 2 teaspoons to 1 cup hot water.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked chicken, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 jar mushrooms or fresh mushrooms if you prefer, 1 onion (medium), 1 c. converted rice, 1/2 c. celery, 1/2 c. green pepper, 1/4 c. milk, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onion and mushrooms in margarine. Add two cups chicken broth from cooked chicken. Bring to boil. Add converted rice and cook, covered, for 15 minutes. Chop the celery and green pepper. Add to rice along with 2 cups chicken, milk, salt and pepper to taste. Simmer 20 minutes, covered.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion, green pepper and celery in margarine. add mushrooms and rice. cook until done. add milk, salt and pepper. add chicken.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. Bisquick, 3 eggs, 1 c. sugar, 2/3 c. canned pumpkin, 1 c. chopped nuts, 2 tsp. cinnamon, 1 tsp. pumpkin pie spice, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oven to 375 degrees. Line a jelly roll pan with wax paper and grease. Beat eggs and sugar until fluffy. Add pumpkin. Add dry ingredients and stir in. Pour into pan. Spread evenly and sprinkle with nuts. Bake 13 to 15 minutes. Invert pan onto towel sprinkled with confectioners sugar. Roll up in towel and cool completely. Unroll and spread with filling. Reroll and refrigerate until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients and pour into well-greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan. bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes. let cool 15 minutes before cutting.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 c. flour (sift or spoon into cup), 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. vegetable shortening, 1 egg yolk, milk
ReferenceRecipe: Mix flour, sugar and salt in bowl. Cut in shortening as for pie crust. Put egg yolk in measuring cup and fill with milk to 2/3 cup mark. GeneratedRecipe: sift together first 4 ingredients. cut in shortening, mix with a fork. add egg yolk and milk. add to flour mixture alternately with milk. mix until smooth. roll out and cut with cookie cutters. place on ungreased baking sheet. bake at 325 degrees for 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 6 oz. tri-colored rotini, cooked and drained, 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. reduced-calorie tub margarine, 1 Tbsp. chopped fresh basil, sage or oregano, 1/4 tsp. garlic salt, freshly ground black pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place pasta, margarine, herbs, garlic, salt and pepper in large serving bowl; toss until margarine is melted. Makes 4 servings. Each serving provides: 1FA, 2B.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large saucepan, over medium heat, melt margarine. add garlic and cook over medium heat until lightly browned. add rotini and stir until all remaining ingredients are blended. cover and cook over low heat 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour (plain), 3 tsp. baking powder, 3/4 c. milk, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. shortening
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour, baking powder and salt together. Cut in shortening. Add milk; have the broth boiling and drop by spoonfuls into it. Cover and cook about 10 minutes. The liquid must be kept boiling. Stir occasionally to keep from sticking. Serve while hot.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients. roll out. cut in strips. place on hot griddle and cook until brown.

Ingredients: 10 potatoes (the size of an egg), 2 c. sugar, 2 c. water, 1/4 lb. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Select and wash potatoes. Put in pot. Cover with water. Cook until skin will slip. Drain off hot water. Cover with cold water and peel. GeneratedRecipe: boil until tender. mash potatoes in small bowl. add sugar, butter and salt. beat until smooth. add egg; mix well. add vanilla. put into buttered dish. bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 lb. bulk sausage (lite or regular), 3 c. Bisquick, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. Cheddar cheese (sharp)
ReferenceRecipe: Knead uncooked sausage, Bisquick and cheese. Roll into bite size balls. Cook until brown, or about 20 or 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together and form into patties. bake in moderate oven for 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 large pkg. cream cheese, 1 c. salad dressing, 1 c. pineapple, 1 bottle cherries, 1 c. dates, 1 c. nuts, 1 pt. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Cream the cheese and salad dressing. Chop fine the pineapple, cherries, dates and nuts and add to creamed cheese. Whip the cream and fold into first mixture. Pour into mold and freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: cream the cream cheese and salad dressing together and add remaining ingredients.

Ingredients: 5 c. grated zucchini, 5 c. sugar, 1 (20 oz.) can crushed pineapple, 2 (3 oz.) pkg. orange jello, 2 Tbsp. orange peel or McCormick's
ReferenceRecipe: Boil everything, except jello and peel, together for 15 minutes to a rolling boil, stirring often. Add jello and orange peel last. Put into sterile jars and seal. Makes 9 (1/2 pint) jars. Can use other fruit, such as berries or peaches (match jello).
GeneratedRecipe: mix together. boil until it starts to boil. let boil for 10 minutes. seal in jars and refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 3 3/4 c. sugar, 1 1/2 c. white syrup, 1 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Boil until it forms a hard ball in a cup of cold water. Remove from heat. Add your choice of flavoring and food coloring.
GeneratedRecipe: boil to hard crack stage. pour over 2 cups popped corn.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. chopped dried apricots, 1/3 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 (8-inch) graham cracker pie shell
ReferenceRecipe: Cook apricots with 1 1/2 cups water in saucepan until tender. Blend sugar, salt, cornstarch and 3 tablespoons apricot liquid in small bowl. Stir into apricots. Cook until thick, stirring constantly. Cool. Spoon into pie shell. Chill until serving time.
GeneratedRecipe: drain apricots. add water to make 2 cups. combine sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan. cook over medium heat until thick and thick, stirring constantly. remove from heat and add salt and chopped apricots, stirring until berries are dissolved. pour into baked pie shell. chill until firm ( at least 4 hours ). serve with whipped topping.

Ingredients: 12 eggs, 1 large or 2 medium onions, sauteed, 1/3 lb. sauteed mushrooms, 3 c. Sauce (see below), toast
ReferenceRecipe: Hard boil the eggs. Separate yolks and whites. Chop up whites and crumble yolks, separately, with a fork. Mix egg whites, onions and mushrooms into the sauce. Serve on toast. Sprinkle crumbled egg yolk on top. Sprinkle with paprika. Serve while hot. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: chop onions. add mushrooms and saute. mix eggs and sauce together and pour over mixture and mix well.

Ingredients: 16 oz. rotel tomatoes, 2 Tbsp. butter, salt, 1/4 tsp. oregano, 7 oz. cooked elbow macaroni, 1/4 c onion chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Simmer all together 10 to 15 minutes, sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: cook onion in butter in skillet. add tomatoes and spices. mix and heat through.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1 small carton sour cream, 8 oz. Cheddar cheese, grated, 1 small onion, grated, garlic salt to taste, 1 tsp. chives (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Fix the night before. Serve at room temperature.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together all ingredients and refrigerate. serve with assorted crackers.

Ingredients: 2 cans Early June peas, 1 onion, chopped fine, 8 oz. Cheddar cheese, shredded, 2 eggs, boiled and chopped up, 1/2 c. Miracle Whip, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. garlic, 1/2 tsp. oregano
ReferenceRecipe: Drain peas well, then mix all together and let refrigerate for 24 hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and put in refrigerator for several hours before serving.

Ingredients: 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 2 boxes (2 lb.) powdered sugar, 1 stick margarine, 4 c. pecans or 2 c. pecans and 2 c. coconut, 12 oz. semi chocolate bits, 1/8 lb. paraffin wax
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together ingredients except chocolate and paraffin wax. When mixed, refrigerate 30 minutes; roll into small balls. Refrigerate 30 minutes again. Melt the chocolate and paraffin wax in double boiler. Dip each ball and drop on wax paper. Keep on low heat as wax will catch on fire. Ice pick or small fork good to handle balls.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, margarine, coconut and pecans together. make small balls and refrigerate. melt chocolate bits and paraffin wax until melted. dip balls into chocolate and place on wax paper.

Ingredients: 2 c. mashed, cooked sweet potatoes, 1 c. firmly packed brown sugar, 1 c. light cream, 1/2 c. milk, 3 eggs, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. ground nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger, 1 9 inch deep dish pie shell, 1/2 c. whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sweet potatoes, brown sugar, cream, milk, eggs, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and ginger in a large mixing bowl; Pour into pastry shell. Bake in preheated 350 degree oven for 50 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. Garnish with whipped cream.
GeneratedRecipe: mix the sweet potatoes, milk, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, cinnamon, cinnamon, ginger, ginger and nutmeg. beat until well blended. pour into pie shell. bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes or until knife inserted near center comes out clean. remove from oven.

Ingredients: 5 c. blackberries, 3 c. sugar, water to dissolve sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cook until bubbles come up and burst. Fill hot jars and seal.
GeneratedRecipe: put berries in a large saucepan with sugar and water. bring to boiling; cook until berries are soft, about 5 minutes. remove from heat. let cool and pour into sterilized jars. cover with syrup.

Ingredients: 1 gal. chopped tomatoes, 8 jalapeno peppers, chopped, 2 medium onions, 3/4 c. vinegar, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 3 sweet peppers
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together; bring to a boil and boil 10 minutes. Fill jars; process in hot water bath for 10 minutes. Makes 9 pints.
GeneratedRecipe: chop tomatoes and onions. mix all ingredients; let stand overnight. drain and put in jars.

Ingredients: 1 pt. fresh clean spinach, coarsely chopped, 2 Tbsp. chopped scallions, 2 Tbsp. chopped olives, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 (12 oz.) can chunk tuna in water, 2 Tbsp. French dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Mix spinach, scallions and olives. Sprinkle with salt. Mix tuna and French dressing and let stand 10 to 15 minutes. Just before serving, toss spinach and tuna mixtures. Serve with additional French dressing and hard-cooked eggs. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve on lettuce.

Ingredients: 2 c. pecan halves, 1 c. sugar, 1/2 c. dark corn syrup, 1/2 stick butter, 1-inch sq. paraffin, 2 tsp. soda
ReferenceRecipe: Microwave sugar, syrup and butter 3 minutes on High. Stir in paraffin to melt. Stir in nuts. Mix well and microwave on High 7 to 12 minutes, checking nuts several times to make sure they don't burn. Add soda, quickly stir and pour onto greased surface. Cool and break into pieces. Store in airtight container.
GeneratedRecipe: in a heavy skillet, combine sugar, butter and corn syrup. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil 2 minutes. add soda and stir until it starts to boil. pour in a buttered pan.

Ingredients: 1 stick margarine, 1 1/2 c. sugar, 2 eggs, 1 c. buttermilk, 2 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. vanilla, 4 to 5 c. rhubarb, diced
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together first 3 ingredients. Add next 5 ingredients. Put rhubarb on top of batter mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together. put in greased pan and bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. self-rising flour, 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 egg, milk (to moisten)
ReferenceRecipe: Spoon into skillet of hot oil. Cook approximately 3 minutes on each side.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together and drop by teaspoonfuls into hot oil. cook until golden brown.

Ingredients: 8 graham cracker squares, 12 Tbsp. peanut butter, raisins
ReferenceRecipe: On each cracker, spread peanut butter and then sprinkle with raisins. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: spread peanut butter onto graham cracker. put raisins on top. refrigerate 2 hours. cut in small squares.

Ingredients: 6 c. strawberries, 5 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine strawberries and sugar; cook 15 to 20 minutes. Add lemon juice; cook 10 minutes more. Pour into containers and freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: combine ingredients in saucepan; bring to a boil and cook for 20 minutes. pour in sterilized jars and seal.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked green beans, drained, 6 plum tomatoes, chopped, 1 c. fat-free shredded Mozzarella cheese, 1/4 c. chopped fresh basil, 1/3 c. Good Seasons Italian fat-free dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Place beans, tomatoes, cheese and basil in a large bowl. Pour dressing over beans. Refrigerate at least one hour.

Ingredients: 1 large can kraut, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 c. diced green bell peppers, 1 c. diced red onion, 1/2 c. vinegar, 2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Boil vinegar and sugar. When cool, pour over vegetables and let marinate several hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: bring vinegar and sugar to a boil. let cool, then pour over first 4 ingredients. cover and refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 can peach pie filling, 1 box frozen straw berries, 1 jar cherries, drained, 1 large can pineapple chunks, drained, 1 can mandarin oranges, drained, 4 to 6 bananas, sliced, 1 c. chopped nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together and your salad is made! Refrigerate and serve when chilled.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. refrigerate. serve with a dab of vanilla ice cream, if desired.

Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1 c. corn meal, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 egg, 3/4 c. milk, 1 tsp. sugar, wieners
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients, except wieners, and let stand 1 hour. Dip wieners in batter and deep fry until golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: soak wieners in milk for 10 minutes. mix flour, baking powder, sugar and salt. beat eggs. add milk and wieners. dip in batter. fry in hot grease until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. semi-sweet chocolate, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 (12 oz.) container Cool Whip, thawed, 1/3 c. water, 1/4 c. sugar, 1 graham cracker pie crust
ReferenceRecipe: Stir chocolate into water over low heat until melted; cool. Beat the cream cheese and sugar until smooth; add chocolate. Spoon mixture into pie crust; chill for 3 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: in small saucepan, combine cream cheese and sugar. over medium heat, melt chocolate, stirring constantly, until smooth. let cool to room temperature. beat in cool whip. spoon into graham crust. freeze at least 4 hours or overnight.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 c. pork sausage, 1/2 c. dry bread crumbs, 1/3 c. evaporated milk, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of celery soup, 1 c. evaporated milk, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Combine meat, crumbs, milk and seasonings. Shape into meat balls. Brown and cook 10 minutes. Place in 2 1/2-quart casserole.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and make into 1-inch balls. brown meatballs in a large pot. drain grease. combine remaining ingredients. pour over meatballs. cover and simmer for 30 minutes. serve over noodles.

Ingredients: 3 large carrots, finely grated, 3 Tbsp. finely chopped onion, 3/4 c. raisins, 6 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. chill. serve in lettuce cups or as a side dish.

Ingredients: 1 can white cannelini beans, 2 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/4 c. olive oil, 1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped, 1/4 tsp. oregano, 1/4 tsp. basil, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. tomato paste, 1 lb. macaroni (small shells), Romano cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Saute garlic in olive oil until golden. Slowly add can of cannelini beans and stir. Add parsley, oregano, basil and salt. Add 1 can of water to beans; stir and add tomato paste. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes. In a 3-quart pot, boil water for pasta. Cook according to package directions. Drain and add beans. Heat through; stir and top with Romano cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: saute garlic in oil. add oregano, salt, basil and oregano. add beans. simmer for 10 minutes. add cheese; stir well. add macaroni. cook for 1 minute more. add cheese.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 3 egg whites, 3/4 c. Karo, 3 Tbsp. water, 1/4 tsp cream of tartar, 1/4 tsp salt, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients except the vanilla in the top part of a double boiler and continuously beat with an electric mixer or egg beater until light and fluffy. Add the vanilla.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar, water, egg whites, salt and karo until it forms a soft ball ( about 2 minutes ). add vanilla and salt. beat until creamy.

Ingredients: 1 c. all-purpose flour, sifted, 1 1/2 tsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 tsp. butter, 1 c. sharp cheese, shredded, 1/2 tsp. cayenne pepper, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour, baking powder and salt into a medium size bowl. Blend in butter until mixture is crumbly. Add cheese, cayenne pepper and water. Mix well until mixture holds together. Roll out and cut into strips.
GeneratedRecipe: in medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, pepper and cayenne. cut in butter. add water, stirring until dough forms a ball; chill 30 minutes. cut in cheese, then shape into 6 x 8 x 2-inch rectangle. cut in 2-inch squares. place one side down, in a lightly greased 9-inch pie plate.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1 (18 oz.) jar creamy peanut butter, 1 (7 oz.) jar marshmallow cream
ReferenceRecipe: In a saucepan, boil milk and sugar for about 3 minutes. Add marshmallow cream and peanut butter and mix well. Quickly pour in a buttered 8-inch pan. Chill in ice box until set. Cut into small squares.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar and milk in a large saucepan. let come to a boil, stirring constantly. boil for 3 minutes. remove from heat. add peanut butter; stir until melted. add marshmallow cream. mix well. pour into a greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan.

Ingredients: 3 large peppers (about 3 tea cups), 3 large onions (about 3 tea cups), 1 bunch of celery (6 tea cups), 1 (regular size) bottle catsup (I use a little more), 1 bottle chili sauce, 1 can tomato soup, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef
ReferenceRecipe: Chop pepper, onions and celery fine; steam until tender (don't use much water to steam this). Add tomato soup, catsup and chili sauce to it. Add pepper, salt and a little chili powder to taste. Crumble the ground beef in it. Cook slowly for 30 minutes. Great for picnics and when serving a lot of people.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together and simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 16 oz. English peas (frozen; optional), 1 head broccoli, 1 head cauliflower, 1 large sweet onion
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw frozen peas. Chop broccoli, cauliflower and onion into bite size pieces. Add peas if desired. Mix ingredients together.
GeneratedRecipe: cut broccoli, cauliflower and onion into small pieces. add to peas. mix well. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. raspberry jello, 1 c. boiling water, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. beet juice, 1/4 c. vinegar, 2 tsp. horseradish, 1/4 c. sour cream, 1 (16 oz.) can shoestring beets or sliced and cut, drained well
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve jello in boiling water; add sugar, beet juice, vinegar, horseradish and sour cream. Stir until smooth. Add beets and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. stir in beet juice and vinegar. chill until thickened. fold in beets and beets. pour into a mold or serving bowl. chill until firm. unmold and slice into wedges.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. elbow macaroni, cooked and drained, 1 (12 oz.) can corned beef, 1/4 lb. grated Cheddar cheese, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 c. milk, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 3/4 c. buttered crumbs (about 1/8 lb. melted butter)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook macaroni; drain. Heat milk and soup. Take off fire and add onions, cheese and beef. Cream well. Add to noodles and mix well.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together corned beef, onions and butter. put in greased baking dish. mix soup, milk and onions. pour over casserole. sprinkle grated cheese on top.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 1 pkg. Rice-A-Roni (beef flavor), 1/2 c. salsa, 1 tsp. chili powder, 4 c. shredded lettuce, 1 medium tomato, chopped, 1/2 c. shredded cheese, 1 c. crushed tortilla chips
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat and onions; drain. Remove from skillet; set aside. In same skillet, prepare Rice-A-Roni as directed. Stir in meat mixture, salsa and chili powder; cook 3 to 4 more minutes. Arrange lettuce on platter, top with rice mixture, tomato, cheese and tortilla chips.
GeneratedRecipe: cook ground beef and onions in skillet until meat is brown and onion is tender, stirring to separate meat. stir in salsa, salsa, salsa, chili powder and salsa. mix well. heat through. serve over chips.

Ingredients: 1 egg, 2 c. sifted powdered sugar, 2 1/2 Tbsp. cocoa, 1/8 tsp. salt, butter (size of an egg), 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 Tbsp. cream
ReferenceRecipe: Beat eggs until foamy. Add all, except cream and vanilla, and mix. Then add cream and beat until consistency to spread. Add vanilla.
GeneratedRecipe: cream the butter and add egg. gradually add sugar, cocoa and vanilla. beat until light and fluffy.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. dry yeast, 1 c. warm water, 1 tsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. salad oil, 2 1/2 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve yeast in warm water. Add remaining ingredients. Mix and knead together and let raise for 10 minutes, then spread out on cookie sheet or pizza pie pans.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast in warm water. mix sugar, salt, oil, water and oil together. add to mixture and mix well. add flour. knead dough on floured board until smooth. roll out to 1/4-inch thick. cut and let rise until double. bake on greased cookie sheet about 25 minutes.

Ingredients: 3 c. sugar, 3/4 c. light corn syrup, 3/4 c. water, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry gelatin, 2 egg whites, beaten stiff, 1/2 c. flaked coconut, 1 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar, corn syrup and water. Bring to boil, stirring constantly. Reduce heat and cook to hard ball stage, stirring constantly. Combine beaten egg whites and gelatin; beat until mixture forms peaks. Pour hot syrup in thin stream into egg whites, beating until candy loses gloss and holds shape. Fold in coconut and nuts. Pour into greased 9-inch square pan. When cool, cut in squares.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, corn syrup, water and gelatin. cook over medium heat until dissolved. remove from heat. add egg whites, beating until stiff. add pecans and beat until stiff. drop by teaspoon onto wax paper.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1/4 c. milk, 1 tsp. butter, 1/2 tsp. onion salt, 1 lb. can (2 c.) whole kernel corn, drained
ReferenceRecipe: In saucepan, combine cream cheese, milk, butter and onion salt. Stir over low heat until cheese melts. Add corn and heat.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion in butter. add all ingredients except corn. cook over low heat, stirring frequently until cheese is melted. stir in milk. cook over low heat 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground ham, 1/2 lb. ground pork, 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 c. cracker crumbs, 2 tsp. chopped onions, 2 tsp. celery or celery salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Blend ham, beef and pork. Add all other ingredients. Form meat balls and place in baking pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together. form into balls and brown in a frying pan.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. cream of tartar, 5 Tbsp. cold water, 2 egg whites, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix in saucepan, sugar, salt, cream of tartar and water. Stir. Bring to a full boil. Place two egg whites in small mixer bowl. Do not beat until syrup is cooked. Pour syrup slowly over the egg whites, while beating at high speed, until all syrup has been added. Reduce speed to medium. Add vanilla; beat until mixture is of spreading consistency. Ice cake. May sprinkle on coconut, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, salt, water and whites in top of double boiler. cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves. pour into egg whites and continue beating until frosting is thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/2 c. margarine, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 large container Cool Whip, 2 (3 1/2 oz.) pkg. instant pudding, 3 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 (1 1/2 lb.) pkg. Oreos
ReferenceRecipe: Spread 1/2 crushed cookies in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Mix the cream cheese and butter until smooth. Mix in powdered sugar. Fold in Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: crush oreos and set aside. mix milk, margarine, pudding and cream cheese. add cool whip. mix together cream cheese, powdered sugar, vanilla and margarine. mix in separate bowl. put layer oreos in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. layer of mixture.

Ingredients: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can creamy onion soup, 1 can cream of celery soup, 3 or 4 lb. chuck roast beef
ReferenceRecipe: Place roast with 1 tablespoon water in the crock-pot. Cook on low for 4 hours. Add soups. Do not add water. Continue cooking on low for 6 more hours. Meat should be tender. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: cook roast. add soups, celery soup, and onions. simmer until roast is tender.

Ingredients: 2 mangos, 2 cups milk, 5 Tbsp. sugar, 7 (or more) cubes of ice
ReferenceRecipe: First, slice mangos in cubes and place in a blender. Then, add 2 cups of milk and add sugar. Lastly, put in 7 (or more) cubes of ice and blend well. Pour in glass and enjoy!
GeneratedRecipe: cut mangos into chunks. peel mangos. cut mangos into cubes. put into a blender. mix all ingredients together. put in blender and blend until smooth.

Ingredients: 4 to 5 lb. skinned fryer chicken parts, 1 tsp. m.s.g., 5 cloves minced garlic, 1 onion, chopped, 1/2 chopped green bell pepper, 2 (15 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 4 bay leaves, 1 tsp. cumin seed, 1 1/2 tsp. dried leaf oregano, 1 c. raisins, 1 c. stuffed green olives, 1 tsp. cider vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken parts in a large deep skillet. Add m.s.g., garlic, onion, green pepper, tomato sauce, bay leaves, cumin, oregano, raisins, olives and vinegar. Cover and bring to a boil. Turn heat down and simmer 1 hour, turning chicken occasionally. Remove chicken to a platter and serve the sauce over rice or noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: in a dutch oven, combine all ingredients, except olives. bring to boil and simmer for 40 minutes. remove chicken from broth. add olives. cover and simmer 30 minutes. remove cover. cut into small pieces. remove chicken to serving dish. keep warm.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 1/2 c. mayo, 4 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 tsp. vinegar, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 2 or 3 pkg. dried beef
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 5 ingredients well, then add dried beef and mix. Refrigerate. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and form into a ball. roll in chopped dried beef.

Ingredients: 1 medium zucchini, 1 Cup instant potato flakes, 1/3 Cup grated cheese, 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 1/4 tsp. garlic salt or powder, 2 eggs beaten, 1/4 Cup melted butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine potato flakes, cheese, celery seed, garlic salt and butter. Dip the zucchini in the eggs and then into the potato mixture. Place on ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 400 degree for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and pour into a greased casserole dish. sprinkle with crushed potato flakes. bake in preheated 350 degree oven for 50 minutes or until done.

Ingredients: 1 c. real mayonnaise, 2 tsp. grated onion, 1/2 tsp. dried dill weed, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. sour cream, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 2 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients and chill. Can be served with chips, crackers or your favorite raw vegetables. Yield: 2 cups.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients well. serve with raw vegetables.

Ingredients: 1 lb. package lil' smokies, 1 can (7-oz.) biscuits, 8 oz. mustard, vegetable spray
ReferenceRecipe: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Drain liquid from smokies. Roll out biscuits one at a time. Cut each into 5 strips. Wrap each strip around each smokie. Spray cookie sheet with vegetable spray and place wrapped smokies on it. Bake for 18 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with mustard. Serve immediately or can be rewarmed in microwave for 3 minutes on medium.
GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 350 degrees. spray a baking pan with pam. place 7-oz pieces in a single layer in a pan. bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. turn and bake for 10 minutes longer or until golden brown.

Ingredients: 3 pkg. egg roll wrappers, 1 pkg. carrots, 1 large head cabbage, 1 bunch green onions, 1 bunch celery, salt and pepper, 1 large yellow onion, 1 bell pepper, 1 lb. ground pork, diced shrimp and chicken
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground pork; season with salt and chopped garlic. Boil chicken; take off bone and cut in small pieces. Boil shrimp; dice and set aside. Heat oil in wok or frying pan. Stir and fry 3 cups vegetables at a time; season and drain. You will need a very large bowl for mixture. Should be cool enough to handle, or you can make it ahead of time and refrigerate. Place handful in corner of wrapper and roll over. Pull sides together in a triangle; moisten corners and roll again. Deep fry in hot oil to a golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: cook chicken and cut up. cook chicken, onion, celery, pepper and celery until tender. add shrimp and shrimp. simmer until shrimp turn pink, then add shrimp, cabbage and shrimp. cook until cabbage is done in a little water. add salt and pepper to taste. serve.

Ingredients: 2 egg whites, 1/4 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 c. chocolate chips, 2 Tbsp. crushed peppermint stick
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg whites and salt until stiff. Add gradually sugar at low speed of mixer. Continue to beat 5 more minutes. Fold in vanilla, chips and candy.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg whites with sugar until stiff. add vanilla, salt and peppermint. beat until stiff. add chocolate chips; fold in peppermint. put in baked pie shell.

Ingredients: 8 Twinkies, cut lengthwise, cream side up, 1 small box French vanilla instant pudding, 1 medium can crushed pineapple, drained, 3 to 4 bananas, 12 oz. Cool Whip, chopped pecans, maraschino cherries (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Put Twinkies in bottom of 9 x 13-inch baking dish. Mix pudding as directed on package. Layer pudding over Twinkies. Drain pineapple good, layer over pudding. Layer sliced bananas next. Cover all with Cool Whip. May top with chopped nuts and cherries. Serve chilled.
GeneratedRecipe: slice twinkies lengthwise in half lengthwise. place in bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. mix pudding mix according to directions on box. add drained pineapple, sliced bananas and cool whip. spread over twinkies. sprinkle with pecans. cover with cherries. refrigerate 24 hours before serving.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. fresh green beans, trimmed, 2 1/2 c. water, 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 2 tsp. minced garlic, 1 Tbsp. dried oregano leaves, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. ground black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to boil. Add beans and cover. Cook until tender. Mix remainder of ingredients in small bowl. Pour over hot beans and toss to coat. Serves 8.
GeneratedRecipe: wash and trim beans. cut into bite sized pieces. place beans in a large saucepan with water. bring to a boil and cover. reduce heat. simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until beans are tender. drain and set aside. heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. stir in green beans and garlic. add green pepper, salt and oregano. cook, stirring constantly, until beans are tender, about 5 to 8 minutes. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 gal. cucumbers, sliced, 8 small onions, sliced, 2 green sweet peppers, sliced, 1/2 c. salt, 5 c. sugar, 5 c. vinegar, 1 1/2 tsp. turmeric, 1 tsp. celery seed, 1 1/2 tsp. ground cloves, 2 Tbsp. mustard seed
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cucumbers, onions, peppers and salt. Soak 3 hours in ice water, then drain. Add sugar, vinegar, turmeric, celery seed, cloves and mustard seed. Boil until pickles change color. Can in jars.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cucumbers, onions, peppers and salt and let stand 3 hours. drain. combine remaining ingredients in large saucepan. bring to a boil. pour over vegetables; heat to boiling point. seal in hot jars, leaving 1/2-inch headspace. yields 6 pints.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 stalks celery, chopped, 1/2 onion, chopped, 1 can sliced chestnuts, drained, 2 c. chicken, cooked and cubed or crab, 1 small pkg. slivered almonds, 1 c. mayonnaise (not Miracle Whip), 1 can chow mein noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 5 ingredients. Thin the mayonnaise with milk and mix in. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Then fold in chow mein noodles and serve on lettuce leaf. Also good for pita pocket.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste, 1 (15 oz.) can whole tomatoes or tomato sauce, 1 tsp. parsley, 1 tsp. oregano, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, 2 eggs, 12 oz. cottage cheese, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. Mozzarella cheese, salt and pepper to taste, lasagna noodles
ReferenceRecipe: In a medium size non-stick skillet, brown beef. Drain grease. Add tomatoes or tomato sauce, tomato paste, garlic powder, parsley, oregano, salt and pepper. Simmer for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. add tomato paste, tomato sauce, tomatoes, salt, pepper and tomato paste. simmer for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 chuck roast (3 to 4 lb.), 1 clove garlic, 1 Tbsp. brown sugar, 4 tsp. meat tenderizer, 1 Tbsp. water, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger, 1/2 tsp. ground pepper, 1/2 tsp. m.s.g., 1/4 c. soy sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Rub chuck roast with meat tenderizer and place in refrigerator for 4 hours. Make a marinade from remaining ingredients. Remove roast from refrigerator; slice into serving size slices. Place meat in marinade for 4 hours or overnight. Broil or barbecue meat until done.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ingredients together and spread on meat. let stand overnight. grill or barbecue.

Ingredients: 1 box Dutch chocolate cake mix, 1 small bag chocolate chips, 1 small chocolate pudding mix
ReferenceRecipe: Follow the directions on box of cake mix. Add pudding mix and chocolate chips. Bake in Bundt pan.
GeneratedRecipe: bake cake according to box directions. when done, cool, poke holes in cake. pour cake mix, pudding over top of cake.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. green peppers, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. uncooked rice, 1 3/4 c. hot water, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 c. oil, 1/2 lb. ground beef, 2 (8 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 1 tsp. prepared mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oil in skillet. Add onion, green peppers, rice and beef. Stir over high heat until lightly browned. Add tomato sauce and remaining ingredients. Mix well and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
GeneratedRecipe: cook peppers and onion in oil until onion is tender and green peppers are tender. add beef. add tomato sauce, mustard, salt and mustard. stir well. cover; simmer 15 minutes. stir occasionally.

Ingredients: 2 c. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. butter/margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 1 Tbsp. butter or margarine, melted, 1/2 c. finely chopped pecans, 3 Tbsp. brown sugar or granulated sugar
ReferenceRecipe: In a mixing bowl, stir together flour, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar, baking powder and salt. Cut in 1/2 cup butter/margarine until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Make a well in the center. Combine egg and milk; add all at once to dry mixture. Stir just until dough clings together. Knead gently on a lightly floured surface for 15 strokes. Roll dough into a 15 x 8-inch rectangle. Brush with 1 tablespoon melted butter. Combine pecans and 3 tablespoons brown sugar; sprinkle over dough.
GeneratedRecipe: combine the first 5 ingredients. add milk and butter. mix well. pat into a greased 9 x 13-inch baking pan.

Ingredients: 5 lb. potatoes, 1 pt. diced sweet pickle, 2 ribs diced celery, 1 diced onion, 6 eggs, boiled and diced, 1/2 to 3/4 c. sugar (to your taste), salt to your taste, 1 1/2 c. Kraft salad dressing (not mayonnaise), 1 Tbsp. celery seed, 2 Tbsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Wash and cook potatoes, with peeling on. Let cool, then peel and cut into small chunks. Add sweet pickles, celery, onion, eggs, sugar, salt, salad dressing, celery seed and mustard. Mix well. Let set for 1 hour, then refrigerate. Better the next day.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling water until tender; drain. cool and add eggs, onion, celery seed and pickle seed. mix with mayonnaise and sugar. add to cooked potatoes and eggs. mix well and chill.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) light Philadelphia cream cheese, 1 c. plain low-fat yogurt, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1 tsp. lemon rind, grated, 14 pkg. Equal
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cream cheese and yogurt. Blend until smooth. Stir in remaining ingredients. Chill. Serve with fresh fruit. Yields 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small mixer bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. gradually blend in yogurt, beating in lemon rind, lemon rind and vanilla. cover and chill. serve with fresh fruit.

Ingredients: 2 lb. baby red potatoes, sliced, 3 1/2 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar, 1 1/2 Tbsp. country-style Dijon mustard, 6 Tbsp. canola oil, 1/2 c. chopped fresh dill, 3/4 lb. pickling cucumbers, sliced, fresh dill sprigs
ReferenceRecipe: Cook the potatoes in pot of boiling water until just tender. Drain. Transfer to a large bowl. Add 2 tablespoons vinegar to hot potatoes and stir gently. Combine remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons vinegar and mustard in a small bowl. Gradually mix in oil. Add chopped dill. Mix into potatoes. Season with salt and pepper. (Can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover, chill and bring to room temperature before serving.) Mix in cucumbers. Garnish with dill sprigs. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender. cool slightly; peel and cut into 1/4-inch slices. place in large salad bowl; set aside. combine vinegar and mustard. add cucumbers and pickling mustard; stir well. add potatoes, cucumbers, dill and pickling mixture. toss gently. cover and refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger, 1 egg, slightly beaten, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 can (16 oz.) stewed tomatoes, 1 large green pepper, chopped, 3/4 c. uncooked instant rice
ReferenceRecipe: Mix beef, eggs, chili powder, salt and pepper. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls. Place in 2-quart casserole. Microwave on High until meatballs are set and lose pink color, 4 to 7 minutes. Drain and stir in remaining ingredients. Cover and cook in microwave at High temperature until mixture is bubbly and onions are tender, 4 to 7 minutes. Stir after half of cooking time. Let stand until rice is tender, 2 to 3 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine all ingredients except green pepper. shape into 8 meatballs. in a 10-inch skillet, brown meatballs and drain off fat. stir in remaining ingredients. cover and simmer 20 minutes or until rice is tender. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. powdered sugar, 1 large can fruit cocktail, drained, 1 (8 oz.) carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together cream cheese and powdered sugar. Blend in fruit cocktail. Fold in Cool Whip. Store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: blend cream cheese and powdered sugar. add cool whip. stir in fruit cocktail. chill.

Ingredients: 15 oz. can tomato sauce, 1 c. catsup, 1 can undiluted tomato soup, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 grated or finely chopped onion, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: You can make your own meatballs. I use ones from Sam's.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together all ingredients except catsup. simmer for 5 minutes. add meat and cook until sauce becomes thick.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. ground chuck, 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 1 (5 oz.) pkg. large noodles, 2 small cans tomato sauce, oregano, celery salt, 1 c. shredded Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground chuck with onions; season to taste with salt, pepper and celery salt and stir well. Add tomato sauce and simmer while noodles cook in separate saucepan. When noodles are cooked, stir them in ground beef mixture and oregano. Pour in casserole dish; top with cheese and place in hot oven, 5 to 7 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger and onion. add celery, tomato sauce, salt and oregano. cook noodles according to directions. drain. add cheese. stir until cheese melts.

Ingredients: 2 lb. ground beef, 2 small onions, chopped, 4 pieces celery, chopped, 2 tsp. chili powder, garlic salt to taste, 2 tsp. salt, green pepper (optional), mushrooms (optional), 2 cans tomato soup, 2 cans mushroom soup, 4 Tbsp. black olives, chopped, 3 cans water, 20 oz. egg noodles, 1 lb. sharp Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown the first 8 ingredients together. Add the remaining ingredients. Simmer slowly for about 30 minutes. Add some tomato juice if mixture gets too thick. Grate and add the cheese. Cook slowly for about 30 minutes more.
GeneratedRecipe: cook ground beef and onions until browned. drain. add tomato soup, water, celery, salt, pepper, garlic and chili powder, if desired. cook on medium heat until noodles are done. add soup. cover and simmer for 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 3 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 c. confectioners sugar, 2 eggs, 2 cans crushed pineapple, drained, 2 pkg. Dream Whip, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, melted, 2 sticks margarine, softened, 1 tsp. vanilla, 4 bananas, 1/2 c. walnuts, chopped, maraschino cherries, drained and sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Mix graham crackers and melted margarine in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Press into bottom of pan. Mix confectioners sugar, margarine, eggs and vanilla for 20 minutes until light and fluffy. Put into pan over graham cracker mixture. Put pineapple on top. Slice bananas over pineapple. Mix Dream Whip as directed on package. Spread over top. Sprinkle nuts over top. Refrigerate overnight, uncovered. Top with cherries before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix the graham cracker crumbs and margarine and press in 9 x 13-inch pan. beat eggs, 1 stick margarine and confectioners sugar until fluffy. spread over graham cracker crust. slice bananas over crust. drain pineapple. spread over bananas. spread dream whip on top. sprinkle walnuts and maraschino cherries over top. top with nuts and cherries. let set.

Ingredients: 1 2/3 c. peach juice, 1 jar spiced peaches, 1 pkg. orange Jell-O, 3 oz. cream cheese, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1/3 c. orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Drain peaches and measure juice. Heat juice to boiling point. Dissolve Jell-O in hot juice. Chill. Soften cream cheese with milk. Add nuts. Cut up peaches and add to Jell-O mixture. Congeal until firm. Serve on lettuce with mayonnaise.
GeneratedRecipe: drain juice from peaches and add water to make 1 cup. dissolve gelatin in 1 cup boiling water. add to cream cheese, mixing until well blended. add peaches and nuts. chill until thickened. fold in orange jell-o.

Ingredients: 1 c. white sugar, 1/2 c. butter, 1 c. white syrup, 1 c. peanut butter, 6 c. Cheerios, 12 oz. pkg. butterscotch chips, melted, 12 oz. chocolate chips, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first three ingredients in saucepan and bring to boil. Then blend in the peanut butter and Cheerios. Mix together and press into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. Frost with the melted butterscotch and chocolate chips.
GeneratedRecipe: bring the white sugar, syrup and white syrup to a boil. remove from heat. add peanut butter. pour over cheerios. press into 9 x 13-inch pan. melt chocolate chips and butterscotch chips in microwave. spread over cheerios.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. Heritage butter, 1/2 c. unbleached flour, 2 1/4 c. Heritage milk, 1 c. Parmesan cheese, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter slowly in saucepan; add flour, cool a few minutes. Slowly add milk, then cheese and salt. Cook until thickens. Serve with tomato sauce on the side.
GeneratedRecipe: mix well. divide into 8 equal portions ( 8 ounce ) balls. roll out on floured board. cut into 1-inch strips.

Ingredients: 1 small head cauliflower, cut in small pieces, 1 red or green pepper, diced, 1 small Vidalia onion, diced, 8 oz. grated Cheddar cheese, 1/2 to 1 c. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together using only enough mayonnaise to hold veggies together. Chill several hours. Crunchy and delicious. You might not even know it's cauliflower if you make the pieces small enough! Yields 6 to 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: put cauliflower in bowl and add onion and red pepper to cover. add mayonnaise and toss lightly.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, skinned and deboned, 2 stalks celery, diced well, 1 c. diced onion, 2 qt. tomatoes (fresh or canned), 4 medium potatoes, diced, 1 qt. butter beans, drained if canned, 1 qt. corn, drained if canned, 5 Tbsp. sugar, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken, celery and onion in a large kettle. Add a quart of water. Simmer until meat is tender. Lift meat from broth and cool. Dice. To the broth, add tomatoes, diced potatoes, meat, beans, corn and sugar. Salt to taste. Simmer slowly, stirring occasionally, for 3 hours. Makes about 6 quarts. Can freeze. Can do ahead.
GeneratedRecipe: put chicken in pot with enough water to cover. cook until tender. take chicken off bone. return to pot. add potatoes, corn, celery, onion and tomatoes. cook until potatoes are done. add sugar and butter ( optional ). stir until mixed. serve.

Ingredients: 2 lb. beans (California pea beans or New York State beans preferred), 1/2 lb. sauteed bacon or 1/2 lb. salt pork, 8 Tbsp. sugar, 2/3 c. molasses, 2 tsp. dry mustard, 4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 medium size onion, 1 1/2 qt. water
ReferenceRecipe: Soak beans overnight. In the morning, parboil them for 10 minutes with a teaspoon of baking soda. Then run cold water through the beans in a colander.
GeneratedRecipe: soak beans overnight. cover with water. bring to boil. add salt, pepper, sugar, mustard, dry mustard and salt. cook 1 1/2 hours. add bacon and onion. cook another 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 large sweet red pepper, 1 large sweet yellow pepper, 1 medium sweet Spanish onion, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3/4 tsp. thyme (dried) leaves, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 6 fresh Polish sausage links, 1/2 c. water, 1/2 c. dry white wine
ReferenceRecipe: Cut each pepper into	12 wedges. Cut onion into 1/2 inch thick slices. Separate into rings. Cook peppers, onion, garlic and thyme in oil in large skillet, over medium heat, 8 to	10 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove to warm platter. Keep warm.
GeneratedRecipe: cut sausage links into 1/2-inch slices. cut sausage in quarters. in a large skillet, heat oil; add sausage links and garlic. cover and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes. add onion and garlic. cook 2 minutes. stir in wine and cook until wine is reduced, about 20 minutes. stir occasionally. add pepper leaves and thyme; simmer 5 minutes. serve over sausage. yields 6 servings.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1 box 10x powdered sugar, 2 envelopes Dream Whip, 1 can blueberry or cherry pie filling, 1/2 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cream cheese and sugar together until crumbled with fingers or large fork in a large baking pan. Put in the freezer and let stay until the other ingredients are prepared. Whip Dream Whip according to direction on package. Bake two pie shells with the pecans sprinkled on the bottom. Let cool. Take the cream cheese mixture out of the freezer and add gradually to whipped Dream Whip and beat in mixer until smooth. Pour in cooled pie shells and refrigerate until set. Top with one can of pie filling and serve. This makes 2 pies.
GeneratedRecipe: beat dream whip until soft cream cheese and add powdered sugar. beat until thick, but not stiff. fold in cream cheese mixture. spread half of mixture in a 9 x 13-inch pan. top with pie filling. sprinkle with pecans. chill until set.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, 1 1/2 c. sour cream, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 pkg. Knorr vegetable soup mix, 1 (8 oz.) can water chestnuts, chopped, 3 chopped green onions
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw and drain chopped spinach. Blend with rest of the ingredients. Chill and serve with rye bread.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw spinach and squeeze dry. combine all ingredients; mix well. cover and refrigerate at least 24 hours. serve with crackers or raw vegetables.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sharp cheese, 1 large Philadelphia cream cheese, 1 c. crushed pecans, 3 tsp. garlic powder, chili powder
ReferenceRecipe: Grate sharp cheese and mix with cream cheese. Add crushed nuts and garlic powder. Shape into two or three long rolls. Roll in chili powder until well covered. Roll in wax paper, then Reynolds Wrap. Place in refrigerator until ready to serve. Chill well.
GeneratedRecipe: let cheese stand at room temperature. mix in garlic powder and pecans. roll into chili powder. roll in chili powder. chill until firm, then roll in chili powder.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. honey, 1 (18 oz.) bottle Kraft barbecue sauce, 1 lb. hot dogs, cut up
ReferenceRecipe: Mix honey and barbecue sauce together. Microwave on High for 1 minute. Add cut up hot dogs. Cook 3 minutes on High in 2-quart casserole dish.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together and simmer. serve warm.

Ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) sweetened condensed milk, 1 (8 oz.) plain or vanilla yogurt, 1/2 c. chocolate flavored syrup, 2 to 3 candy bars, broken, chopped, 2 c. crushed ice
ReferenceRecipe: In blender, combine all ingredients until smooth. Serve immediately. Garnish as desired.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sweetened condensed milk, yogurt and candy bars. beat until well blended. spoon into dessert glasses and top with remaining ice cream. garnish with chopped candy bars or fresh strawberries. yield : 6 servings.

Ingredients: 1 whole chicken (4 to 5 lb.) or 8 chicken breast halves, cooked and deboned, 1 (28 oz.) can whole tomatoes, 3 large potatoes, diced, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/2 lb. okra, sliced, 1 (14 oz.) can cream-style corn, 1/2 c. catsup, 1/2 c. barbecue sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Combine chicken, tomatoes, potatoes, onion and okra in 5-quart crock-pot. Set on low; cook 8 hours or until potatoes are tender. Add corn, catsup and barbecue sauce. Cook 10 more minutes and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: place chicken, potatoes, onion and potatoes in dutch oven. mix catsup, catsup, tomatoes and catsup. bring to a boil. boil. reduce heat. simmer for 40 minutes. remove chicken from bones.

Ingredients: 1 large head cabbage, grated, 1 c. celery, chopped, 1 green or red pepper, chopped, 1 small onion, chopped, 1 c. carrots, grated fine, 2 c. white sugar, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. mustard seed, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together. This keeps for days or can be frozen.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cabbage, onion and pepper together. sprinkle with sugar and celery seed. add remaining ingredients. heat to a boil and pour over cabbage mixture. mix thoroughly. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 can chunk pineapple, 2 cans mandarin oranges, 1 c. miniature marshmallows, 1 c. coconut, 1 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Drain fruit real good before mixing with other ingredients. Prepare night before and place in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: drain oranges, pineapple and oranges. add coconut, marshmallows and sour cream. mix together. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 3 c. water, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. macaroni, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1/4 c. milk, 1 c. cube cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to boil. Add salt and macaroni; cook until tender. Drain. Add margarine or butter, milk and cheese. Stir until all is melted together.
GeneratedRecipe: cook macaroni in water and salt until tender. add remaining ingredients except macaroni. bring to boil. stir occasionally, but do n't overcook.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1 cube butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Cook to soft ball stage. Remove from heat and add 1 teaspoon vanilla, a little red cake coloring and 1/2 teaspoon soda last thing. Pour over 5 or 6 quarts popcorn. Cover good and pour out on cookie sheet to cool.
GeneratedRecipe: boil sugar and milk for 5 minutes. add margarine and beat until thick. serve over biscuits, etc.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 c. whole wheat flour, 1/2 c. powdered milk, 6 Tbsp. margarine, 1 tsp. brown sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1/2 c. ice water, bouillon cube (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix flour, milk, margarine, sugar and salt together as for pie dough. Mix egg, water and bouillon. Add to first mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together dry ingredients. cut in margarine with pastry blender or two knives. add egg and milk. blend well. add water, then add to flour mixture and mix until smooth.

Ingredients: 3 lb. ground beef, 1 stick butter, 1 small can pimentos, 1 can tomato soup, salt and pepper, chili powder to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef. Put in the remainder of ingredients and let simmer 3 to 4 hours on low.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. add remaining ingredients and simmer until desired thickness.

Ingredients: 1 medium head cabbage, 1 1/2 c. water, 2 medium potatoes, stripples, fried and crumbled on top, 1 medium green pepper, 1 medium onion, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Slice cabbage and wash. Lay cabbage in frying pan. Slice onion, green pepper and potatoes over cabbage. Pour in water and stripple drippings. Cook on high until boiled down. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer 5 minutes. Remove cover and cook until tender.
GeneratedRecipe: slice the cabbage and green onion. put in a pot with enough water to cover the potatoes. boil until tender. add the rest of the ingredients and cook until the vegetables are tender.

Ingredients: 12 oz. bag cranberries, 3/4 of 1 orange with peel, 2 (3 oz.) pkg. lemon jello, 3 c. very hot water, 3/4 c. diced celery, 3/4 c. chopped pecans, 3/4 c. crushed pineapple, drained
ReferenceRecipe: Grind cranberries and cut up orange in food chopper. Add sugar and let stand in refrigerator. Dissolve jello in hot water. Chill until syrupy. Add all other ingredients and stir well. Chill and stir again. Place in refrigerator until firm. Best made the day before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: grind cranberries, celery and orange. add pecans and pineapple. mix jello and water. let jell.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. bacon, 1 large onion, 2 c. chopped potatoes, 2 c. water, salt and pepper, 2 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Saute bacon with chopped onion until bacon is browned and onion is very tender. Add water, potatoes, salt and pepper. Cover; bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender. Add 2 cups milk and heat the chowder until it is very hot, but not boiling.
GeneratedRecipe: cut potatoes into 1-inch thick slices. place in large dutch oven with water. cover and cook until tender. drain, reserving 1 1/2 cups of fat. add potatoes and onion in pan. cook until tender, about 10 to 15 minutes. add milk and salt and pepper to taste. heat until cheese melts.

Ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen lemonade, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen limeade, 1 large bottle ginger ale, 4 c. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients just before serving. Pour over crushed ice or frozen ice ring. Serves 12 to 15.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ingredients together and freeze. take out of freezer and place in punch bowl.

Ingredients: 2 c. ketchup, 2 c. brown sugar, 1 c. bourbon, 3 pkg. Oscar Mayer smoked sausages, cut into bite size pieces *
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ketchup, brown sugar and bourbon in a saucepan. Bring to a full boil. Lower heat and allow sauce to thicken, about 30 minutes. Add sausages and cook for 10 minutes. Serve hot. Sauce may be saved in refrigerator for several days.
GeneratedRecipe: * can be used instead of sausages, sausage, pork or ribs.

Ingredients: 2 small pkg. strawberry Jell-O, 1 c. boiling water, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen strawberries, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 large can crushed pineapple with juice, 2 large bananas, mashed, 1/2 pt. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve Jell-O in boiling water and add all other ingredients, except sour cream. Pour 1/2 of mixture in square, glass container and let set up in refrigerator until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: mix strawberry jell-o in boiling water. stir in frozen strawberries and pineapple. add nuts and strawberries. pour half mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan. refrigerate until set. spread with sour cream and chill.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. Hershey's cocoa, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1/2 c. "151" rum, 2 Tbsp. light corn syrup, 2 1/2 c. crushed vanilla wafers, 1 c. coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix thoroughly. Shape into 1-inch balls. Roll in sugar (1/2 cup). Place on wax paper. Can be stored in well-sealed container.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. shape into balls. roll in coconut.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. unflavored gelatin, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 4 egg yolks, 1/2 c. lime juice (2 to 3 limes), 1/4 c. water, 1 tsp. grated lime peel, 2 to 3 drops green food coloring, 1 graham cracker crust, 4 egg whites, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 c. whipped cream or small bowl Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the 1/2 cup sugar, salt and gelatin. Beat egg yolks, lime juice and water together. Add to gelatin mixture. Bring to a boil; stir in peel and food coloring. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, salt, egg yolks, lime peel and lime juice in a saucepan. cook over low heat, stirring constantly until mixture comes to a boil. remove from heat; add gelatin and stir until dissolved. cool. beat egg whites until foamy. add remaining sugar, lime juice and food coloring. fold into cool whip and spread in pie crust. chill until set.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. hamburger, 1/2 onion, salt and pepper to taste, 1 can cut green beans, 1 can tomato soup, mashed potatoes
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger and onion; drain. Mix all ingredients except potatoes. Put mashed potatoes on top of mix. Broil enough to brown top of potatoes. Let cool for about 15 minutes. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger and drain. add soup, beans, green pepper and onion. cook until heated through. add salt and pepper. serve.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 c. enriched cornmeal, 1 medium-sized eggplant (about 1 1/2 lb.), pared and cut into 1/2-inch slices, 1/2 c. melted butter or margarine, melted, 1 (8 oz.) can pizza sauce, 1 c. (4 oz.) shredded Mozzarella cheese, 2 Tbsp. chopped parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Combine Parmesan cheese and cornmeal. Dip eggplant into butter; coat with cornmeal mixture. Place in greased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2-inch jelly roll pan. Spread slices with pizza sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: peel eggplant and cook in boiling salted water until tender, about 10 minutes. drain and mash. add cornmeal and parsley; set aside.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. light brown sugar, 1/2 c. light corn syrup, 1/2 stick sweet butter, 1/2 c. heavy cream, 1/2 tsp. vanilla extract
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients except for vanilla in a heavy saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. From the time the sauce comes to a full rolling boil, boil it 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from the burner. Add the vanilla. Let cool and serve or pour it into a container. Will keep in the pantry for 1 week; warm before serving. Very good over Haagen dazas Vanilla Swiss Almond ice cream.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients except vanilla in a large saucepan; bring to a boil. simmer 2 minutes. add vanilla. cool and store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 3 medium leeks, chopped, 1/3 c. onion, chopped, 6 Tbsp. butter, 6 Tbsp. flour, salt and pepper to taste, 8 c. chicken stock, 5 c. diced potatoes, 1/2 to 3/4 c. heavy whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Saute leeks and onion in butter; add flour and mix well. Add chicken broth to potatoes with onion mixture. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cook until potatoes are done, about 8 minutes. Add whipping cream and heat through.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in saucepan. add onions and saute until transparent. add leeks ( chopped ). saute until tender. add flour and stir. add chicken stock and potatoes and chicken stock. cook until thick. add potatoes and cream. season with salt and pepper. simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract
ReferenceRecipe: Blend all, mixing well.
GeneratedRecipe: beat together until smooth. spread on cake.

Ingredients: 15 to 20 medium size mushrooms, 6 Tbsp. butter, softened, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3 Tbsp. shredded Jack cheese, 2 Tbsp. dry red or white wine, 1 tsp. soy sauce, 1/3 c. fine cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together last 6 ingredients. Fill mushrooms with cheese mixture. Spray pan with Pam. Broil 5 to 6 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small bowl, mix together first 3 ingredients. in a small bowl, whisk together butter, soy sauce, cheese, garlic and wine or white wine until well blended.

Ingredients: 1 (15 oz.) can Hormel chili (no beans), 4 c. tortilla chips, 1 1/2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 1 1/2 c. shredded lettuce, 1 (6 oz.) container avocado dip
ReferenceRecipe: In a small saucepan, heat chili until hot. Scatter chips on a large serving platter. Layer hot chili, cheese, lettuce and avocado dip on top. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: layer in 9 x 13-inch microwave-safe dish. spread avocado dip over beans. top with cheese. microwave on high for 4 minutes. serve with nacho chips.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 to 3 c. cooked, chopped chicken, 1 c. celery, diced, 1 tsp. salt, 1 (8 1/2 oz.) can pineapple tidbits, drained, 1 (11 oz.) can mandarin oranges, drained, 1/2 c. slivered almonds, toasted, 1/2 c. lemon peel, 2 Tbsp. chopped green onions, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine and mix well.
GeneratedRecipe: combine chicken, celery, onions and celery in small bowl. stir in lemon juice, lemon juice and salt. toss with chicken mixture. cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours. serve on lettuce or on lettuce.

Ingredients: 1 bag medium-hot cinnamon candies, 1 large can crushed pineapple, 1/3 c. large marshmallows, 1 large Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together candies and pineapple; let set for 2 hours. Then mix together with remaining ingredients.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients and refrigerate. makes a great dessert !

Ingredients: 1 c. uncooked noodles, 2 c. uncooked cabbage, 2 Tbsp. margarine or butter, Velveeta cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Cook noodles. Cook cabbage in a separate pan so the cabbage does not dominate the flavor. Toss the two together; heat again after adding the seasonings (salt and pepper).
