GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 375 degrees. in a large bowl, combine spaghetti sauce, egg and parmesan cheese. dip chicken in egg mixture, then in crumb mixture. coat chicken with crumb mixture. in skillet over medium heat, saute chicken in butter over medium heat until browned on both sides, about 10 minutes. stir occasionally. remove from heat.

Ingredients: 4 heaping c. fresh strawberries, 1 Tbsp. white vinegar, 4 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cover and boil strawberries and vinegar for 2 minutes. Add sugar and boil for 20 minutes. Put in pans to cool. Jars can be sealed or put in deep freeze not sealed.
GeneratedRecipe: wash strawberries; remove stems and slice. combine sugar and vinegar in a saucepan and bring to a boil. boil for 1 minute. add strawberries. let cool and pour into clean jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 can cherry pie filling, 1 can condensed milk, 1 large Cool Whip, 1 c. pecans, chopped, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 (9-inch) pie shells, baked and cooled
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all the ingredients well and fill the baked pie shells.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together. pour into pie shells and chill.

Ingredients: 1 (20 oz.) pkg. cream-filled chocolate sandwich cookies (i.e. Oreo), 1/4 c. soft butter or margarine, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. softened cream cheese, 1 c. powdered sugar, 3 1/2 c. milk, 2 (4 serving size) pkg. instant French vanilla pudding, 1 (8 oz.) container frozen nondairy whipped topping, thawed, gummy worms
ReferenceRecipe: Crush cookies in large, plastic bag, using a rolling pin or use a food processor or blender and pulverize five at a time. Set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, crush cookies in a food processor or blender. in a medium bowl, beat together the cream cheese, butter and margarine until light and fluffy. add pudding, milk and whipped topping. beat on high speed until blended. fold in 1/2 of the pudding mixture.

Ingredients: 1 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. oleo, 1/4 c. white Karo syrup, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. baking soda, 2 c. popcorn kernels
ReferenceRecipe: Pop the 2 cups of popcorn according to directions. Take a large brown grocery bag and spray the inside with Pam. Put the popped corn in the bag. Bring to boil the sugar, oleo, syrup and salt. Boil for a full 2 minutes on High, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and add soda. Pour mixture into bag and stir into the popcorn. Fold bag down and shake. Put bag into microwave on High for 1 1/2 minutes. Take out and shake then return it to the microwave for another 1 1/2 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: combine brown sugar, oleo, syrup and salt. bring to a rolling boil; cook 2 minutes. add baking soda and stir until it melts.

Ingredients: 1 can tomato juice, 1 Tbsp. dry mustard, 1 bay leaf, 3 whole cloves, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. salt, Accent, 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 1/2 tsp. orange rind, 1 pkg. lemon Jell-O, 3 Tbsp. gelatine, 2 c. cold water, juice of 1 lemon, 1 can tomato juice
ReferenceRecipe: Pour first 9 ingredients in pan and simmer for a long time; do not boil. In a large pan, put remaining ingredients and mix well. Then strain hot mixture into cold, stirring constantly. Pour into tray and sprinkle with finely minced onion.
GeneratedRecipe: heat the first 4 ingredients. dissolve gelatine in cold water. mix tomato juice with remaining ingredients. put in a 9 x 13-inch pan and let set.

Ingredients: 1 bunch broccoli, 1/2 head cauliflower or broccoli flower, 1 red onion, 1 c. blonde raisins, 6 crisp bacon strips, 1/2 c. mayonnaise (or more if desired), 1/3 c. red wine vinegar, 3 Tbsp. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cut broccoli and cauliflower into small flowerets. Slice red onion thinly and separate into rings. Mix with blonde raisins. Mix mayonnaise, vinegar and sugar together. Mix with broccoli mixture. Crush bacon and sprinkle on top of salad. Chill at least one hour. Will keep several days in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients; pour over vegetables and let marinate overnight.

Ingredients: 2 c. pumpkin seeds, 4 Tbsp. butter, seasoned salt
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in shallow pan. Spread seeds out. Sprinkle with salt. Roast in oven 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in skillet over low heat. add seeds. cook until seeds are tender. sprinkle with seasoned salt. serve hot.

Ingredients: 4 1/2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 tall can evaporated milk, 12 oz. semi-sweet chocolate bits, 12 oz. German chocolate bits, 1 pt. marshmallow cream, 2 c. nut meats
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together sugar, butter and evaporated milk and boil 6 minutes. Put in large bowl. Pour boiling syrup over remaining ingredients in bowl. Beat until melted and pour into a buttered pan. Let stand a few hours before cutting. Store in metal box.
GeneratedRecipe: boil first 4 ingredients for 8 minutes. remove from heat and add chocolate bits, nuts and chocolate. stir until melted. pour into buttered 13 x 9-inch pan.

Ingredients: 6 oz. smoked or chipped beef, diced fine, 2 lb. cream cheese, 8 oz. sharp Cheddar cheese, grated, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/4 c. pickle relish, 1/8 tsp. Tabasco sauce, 1/4 tsp. onion salt, dash of white pepper
ReferenceRecipe: This creamy cheese ball is a quick and easy treat for holiday parties.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together and form into 1 large ball. roll in chopped nuts. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 large can sliced peaches, 1 c. mini marshmallows, 1 pkg. peach jello, 1 (8 oz.) container peach yogurt, 1 (8 oz.) tub Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Drain peaches; cut into bite size pieces. Add yogurt, marshmallows and Cool Whip. Sprinkle dry jello in and stir well. Ready to eat.
GeneratedRecipe: drain peaches and save juice. in a bowl, stir jello and marshmallows until dissolved. let stand 10 minutes. stir in cool whip. fold in peaches. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. butter or margarine, 1 (7 oz.) bag flaked coconut, 1/2 c. chopped pecans, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. softened cream cheese, 1 (14 oz.) can sweetened condensed milk, 1 (16 oz.) whipped topping (Cool Whip), 2 deep baked pie shells, 1 (12 oz.) jar caramel topping
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in heavy pan. Add coconut and nuts. Cook and stir until golden brown. Set aside. Mix cream cheese and milk and beat until smooth. Fold in whipped topping.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine in skillet. add coconut and pecans. cook until browned. remove from heat. cool slightly.

Ingredients: 2 grated cucumbers *, 2 grated carrots, 1 c. diced celery, 1 small onion, grated, 1/2 green pepper, chopped, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 pkg. gelatin
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve gelatin in 1/4 cup cold water, then set in hot water. Mix with mayonnaise and other ingredients. Use as a spread for fancy sandwiches on white or brown bread.
GeneratedRecipe: * i use the cucumbers, celery and carrots, cucumbers.

Ingredients: 3 c. cooked, mashed sweet potatoes, 1/2 c. sugar, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 stick margarine, melted, 1/2 c. milk, 1 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/3 c. all-purpose flour, 1 c. chopped nuts, 1/3 stick margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Combine potatoes, sugar, eggs, salt, 1/2 stick margarine, milk and vanilla. Spoon into a 1 to 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients and pour into a casserole dish.

Ingredients: 4 c. torn iceberg lettuce, 4 c. torn bibb lettuce, 2 stalks celery, sliced, 2 carrots, shredded, 1 c. mandarin oranges, drained, 2 Tbsp. sliced almonds, toasted
ReferenceRecipe: Place salad greens on 4 salad plates. Arrange sliced celery, shredded carrots, mandarin oranges and sliced almonds over greens. Drizzle with Zesty Salad Dressing.
GeneratedRecipe: toss all ingredients together. makes 4 to 6 servings.

Ingredients: 3/4 c buttermilk, 1/4 c oil (wesson), 1 lb parkay margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients with mixer. Recipe will be double when finished.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and refrigerate. great on baked potato salad or crackers.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. graham cracker crumbs, 1/2 c. pecans, crushed (save 1 Tbsp. for topping), 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 2 Tbsp. granulated sugar, 1/4 c. butter, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients and press with a fork into the bottom of a spring form pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together the first 6 ingredients and press in a 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 2 Tbsp. Heinz 57 sauce, 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, 1/4 tsp. hot sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together. Roll in chopped nuts and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: blend all ingredients until smooth. chill. serve with assorted vegetables ( such as carrots, celery or other vegetables. )

Ingredients: 1 box yellow cake mix, 1 large can crushed pineapple, not drained, 2 pt. frozen strawberries, not drained, 2 large boxes vanilla pudding (or 4 small boxes French vanilla), 6 to 8 c. milk (based on size pudding), 2 medium Cool Whip (I use Harris Teeter)
ReferenceRecipe: Bake cake according to directions and cut in half.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cake according to package directions. bake in a 9 x 13-inch pan. cool. mix pudding, milk and drained pineapple together. mix with strawberries. spread over cake. spread cool whip on top of teeter cake. chill.

Ingredients: 1 skillet of corn bread, 4 pieces light bread, 6 stalks celery, 1 large onion, chicken broth, 2 Tbsp. sage, a little black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Cook a skillet of corn bread according to directions, except add fewer eggs. Bake. Crumble corn bread. Toast 4 pieces of light bread in corn bread. Cook the celery and onion in chicken broth until tender. Pour mixture in corn bread; mix with a fork until moist (not wet). Add the sage and black pepper. Eat as is, or bake and eat with chicken gravy.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up celery, onion and celery. add bread and chicken broth. add bread pieces, sage and pepper. mix well. pour on a greased baking dish. bake about 1 hour.

Ingredients: 2 slices white bread, Dukes mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Spread mayonnaise on each slice of bread. (Be sure not to put too much mayonnaise.) Put slices together and eat.
GeneratedRecipe: cut bread into 4 pieces. toast the bread on both sides. spread mayonnaise evenly on both sides of bread. roll up like a jelly roll. put on cookie sheet. place in freezer. slice and serve.

Ingredients: 2 lb. jumbo shrimp, 1 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 2 eggs, 1 c. milk, cooking oil
ReferenceRecipe: Shell and devein shrimp; dry on toweling. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, eggs and milk in mixing bowl; beat vigorously. Dip shrimp into batter; fry in deep, hot oil until golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: wash shrimp; dry and cut into small pieces. beat eggs with milk and oil. combine dry ingredients. stir just to blend. dip shrimp in batter and fry in hot oil until golden brown.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 can sliced mushrooms, drained, 1/2 tsp. dried basil, 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, 1/4 c. dry white wine
ReferenceRecipe: In medium skillet, melt margarine. Add chicken and brown on both sides 12 to 16 minutes. Add mushrooms, wine and basil. Cook, covered, over low heat 5 to 10 minutes or until hot. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: place chicken in skillet; sprinkle with basil and basil. heat margarine over medium heat, stirring constantly until chicken is brown. add wine and mushrooms; simmer 5 minutes, until chicken is cooked through.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. butter, 2 Tbsp. flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. sour cream, 2 cans whole kernel white corn, 1 lb. bacon or 1 jar real bacon pieces
ReferenceRecipe: Cook bacon. Cook onion in butter until soft, then blend in flour and salt. Add sour cream gradually to flour mixture, stirring constantly. Heat to boil and add corn. Bring to a boil again and fold in 1/2 cup crumbled bacon or 1/2 jar bacon pieces. Turn into greased baking dish and garnish with remaining crumbled bacon and parsley.
GeneratedRecipe: fry bacon crisp. add onions and cook until tender. add flour and stir until thickened and bubbly. add sour cream, salt and bacon. heat until hot. serve with crackers or cornbread. serves 6.

Ingredients: 3 lb. frozen meatballs, 1 (12 oz.) jar grape jelly, 1 (12 oz.) jar currant jelly, 1 (12 oz.) bottle chili sauce, 1 (12 oz.) bottle cocktail sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in the crock-pot. Stir well! Cover and cook on: low for 8 to 10 hours or high for 4 to 6 hours. Makes about 5 quarts.
GeneratedRecipe: mix jelly, chili sauce and currant jelly and heat. add meatballs and simmer. serve with toothpicks.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. sugar, 2 eggs, 2 c. flour, 2 c. fruit cocktail and juice, 1/2 c. packed brown sugar, 1 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together sugar and flour. Beat eggs and fruit cocktail and add to sugar and flour mixture. Pour into lightly greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan.
GeneratedRecipe: drain fruit cocktail, reserving juice. combine fruit cocktail, eggs, sugar and flour. stir in walnuts and pour into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch dish.

Ingredients: 1 can beefy mushroom soup, 1 1/2 lb. hamburger, 1/2 c. fine dry bread crumbs, 1 egg, slightly beaten, 1/4 c. chopped onion, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1/4 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Mix thoroughly 1/4 cup soup, beef, bread crumbs, egg, onion and pepper; shape firmly into 6 patties. In skillet, brown patties; pour off fat. Stir in remaining soup and water. Cover and cook over low heat 20 minutes or until done. Stir occasionally. Makes 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: combine soup, water, egg, bread crumbs, pepper and onion. shape into 6 patties. brown in shortening in skillet. drain. stir in soup and water. heat to boiling. cover. reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes or until done.

Ingredients: 1 box yellow cake mix, 16 oz. crushed pineapple, 15 oz. mandarin oranges, 16 oz. whip topping, 1 box instant vanilla pudding mix
ReferenceRecipe: Follow cake instructions except where it calls for water. Substitute mandarin orange juice and then add water to equal what the recipe called for. After cake is mixed well, add oranges and pour into 13 x 9 x 2 inch greased pan. When cake is done, let it cool well then pour topping over.
GeneratedRecipe: bake cake according to directions on box. mix the pudding mix according to directions on box. bake in a 9 x 13-inch pan. let cool. mix pudding with a mixer, then spread on cake, then add drained pineapple. spread on topping.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 2 1/2 c. oats, 4 Tbsp. cocoa, 1/4 lb. margarine, 2 heaping knifefuls crunchy peanut butter, 1 dash vanilla, 1/2 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Blend all ingredients (except oats). Heat to full, rolling boil. Cook for 1 1/2 minutes; remove from heat. Stir in oats and spoon onto waxed paper.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar, cocoa, margarine, milk and margarine for 1 minute. remove from heat. add peanut butter, oats and vanilla. mix well. drop by teaspoons on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1 lb. lean ground round, 1/2 c. diced celery, 1 Tbsp. instant minced onion, 1 can (28 oz.) whole tomatoes and liquid, 1/2 c. uncooked long grain rice, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 can (4 oz.) mushroom pieces and liquid
ReferenceRecipe: Place a plastic colander in a large glass mixing bowl. Crumble ground round into small pieces and cover with wax paper. Microwave on High for 5 minutes or until meat is no longer pink, stirring after 2 1/2 minutes. In a 3-quart casserole, combine ground beef, celery, onion, tomatoes, rice, chili powder, pepper and mushrooms. Microwave covered on High setting for 10 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking time. Stir well. Reduce power level to Medium (50% power), and microwave covered for 20 minutes or until rice is soft. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onion in skillet. drain off excess fat. stir in remaining ingredients and bring to a boil. cover; reduce heat. simmer for 15 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed. makes about 4 cups.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. cocoa, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 1/2 c. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Beat on a low speed to blend. Beat on medium speed until stiff peaks form.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cocoa, sugar and whipping cream in a saucepan; bring to a boil and boil for 2 minutes. remove from heat. add vanilla; cool. pour over ice cream.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. mushrooms, 2 to 3 cans chopped clams, drained, 1/8 c. dried basil leaves, 1/2 c. snipped fresh parsley, 1/2 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/4 c. almonds or pine nuts, 2 cloves fresh garlic, 1/3 c. olive oil, 1/8 to 1/4 c. chicken broth or water, 12 oz. spaghetti noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Chop mushrooms and saute with 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large frying pan; set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta according to package directions. drain and set aside. in large skillet over medium heat heat, cook garlic and oil for 3 minutes. add clams, chicken broth, basil and water. simmer until sauce is reduced by half. add clams, almonds and parmesan cheese. stir and serve over pasta.

Ingredients: 2 c. semi-sweet chocolate chips, 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1 c. peanut butter chips, dash of salt
ReferenceRecipe: Line 8-inch square pan with foil. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips with condensed milk, vanilla and salt; blend well. Remove from heat. Add peanut butter chips, stir just enough to distribute chips evenly in mixture. Spread into prepared pan. Refrigerate for 2 hours or until firm. Remove from pan, peel off foil and cut into squares. Makes about 2 pounds.
GeneratedRecipe: melt first 3 ingredients in saucepan over low heat. remove from heat and add remaining ingredients. stir until blended. spread into foil-lined 8-inch pan.

Ingredients: 1 large can refried beans, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 c. sour cream, 1 envelope taco mix, 1 bunch chopped green onions, 3 tomatoes, chopped, 2 small cans ripe olives, chopped, grated Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Spread beans in a rectangular cake pan. Mix mayonnaise, sour cream and taco mix together, then spread over beans. Chop onions and sprinkle on top. Place chopped tomatoes over onions and olives over tomatoes. Sprinkle cheese on top. Can be made 1 to 2 days ahead. Serve with taco chips.
GeneratedRecipe: spread beans in a 9 x 13-inch pan. mix sour cream, mayonnaise and taco mix. layer the refried beans, onions, olives and grated cheese. sprinkle with grated cheese. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 1 lb. black-eyed peas, rinsed and sorted, 1/2 lb. bacon, cooked and crumbled plus additional crumbled bacon (optional), 1 large onion, chopped, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1/2 tsp. dried thyme, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place peas, beans and enough water to cover in a large kettle; bring to a boil. Boil 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Cover and let stand 1 hour. Do not drain.
GeneratedRecipe: soak peas in water overnight. next morning, drain and set aside. in a large pan, melt butter over medium heat; add onion, garlic, thyme, salt, thyme and thyme. cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. add peas. cook, stirring, until tender and crisp and bubbly. stir in crumbled bacon; heat through. serve with crusty french bread.

Ingredients: 1 London Broil (or Steak of your choice), About 2 cups of Veggies of your choice - (We use carrots, peas and broccoli florets), Vegetable oil for frying, About 1/2 cup of sauce: Teriyaki Sauce, Soy Sauce or any flavor you like
ReferenceRecipe: (We also use Mandarin Marinade - found in Asian aisle of Stop & Shop.)
GeneratedRecipe: heat oil in a wok. add steak and saute until golden brown. add teriyaki sauce and stir. cook until done.

Ingredients: 2 c. shelled peas or 10 oz. pkg. frozen peas, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 1 Tbsp. margarine or butter, 1/2 tsp. dried dill weed, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Cook peas and onion, covered, in a small amount of boiling water for 10 to 12 minutes or until crisp-tender (or cook frozen peas and onion according to peas package directions). Drain well. Stir in margarine, dill weed, salt and pepper. Heat through.
GeneratedRecipe: cook peas in boiling water for 5 minutes or until crisp-tender. drain. in a large nonstick skillet, cook onion in margarine over medium heat for 3 to 5 minutes or until tender. add peas, peas, salt and pepper. toss to coat. cover and cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Ingredients: 1-6 oz. pkg. butterscotch chips, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1-3 oz. can chow mein noodles or corn flakes, 1 c. miniature marshmallows
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butterscotch chips and peanut butter in the top of a double boiler. Fold in the chow mein or corn flakes, then marshmallows. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto greased waxed paper. Cool. Yields 2 dozen.
GeneratedRecipe: melt chips, peanut butter and butterscotch chips over low heat. stir in noodles and marshmallows. drop by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.

Ingredients: 1 c. diced potatoes, 1 c. diced carrots, 3/4 c. sliced onions, 3 Tbsp. catsup, water, 2 Tbsp. flour, 4 or 5 frankfurters, 1 tsp. salt, buttered bread slices
ReferenceRecipe: Mix potatoes, carrots, onions, catsup and 1 1/3 cups of water; cover and cook until vegetables are tender, about 25 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large saucepan, combine potatoes, potatoes, onion, carrots, carrots, water, salt and catsup. bring to a boil. cover and cook 15 minutes. add frankfurters and cook until vegetables are tender. add flour, stirring until smooth. stir into soup; simmer 5 minutes. serves 6.

Ingredients: 1 fryer (2 to 2 1/2 lb.), disjointed, salt and pepper to taste, 1 large onion, sliced, 4 Tbsp. margarine, 1 1/2 tsp. paprika (Hungarian), 1 large tomato, sliced, 1 bell pepper, sliced, 1/4 lb. mushrooms, sliced (if using canned mushrooms, drain), 1/2 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: In a Dutch oven, saute onions until translucent, in margarine. Remove onions with a slotted spoon and set aside. In remaining pan juices, brown chicken well on all sides. Return onions to pan, stir in the paprika, half of the peppers and half of the tomatoes. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes. Turn chicken; add mushrooms and cook, covered, until chicken is tender (approximately 10 to 15 minutes). Transfer chicken to serving dish and keep warm. Stir sour cream into Dutch oven; add a little water if necessary to make pan gravy. Add additional seasoning, if necessary, and pour over chicken. Garnish with remaining tomatoes and pepper slices. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: brown chicken in margarine. remove and set aside. saute mushrooms and onions in margarine until tender. add bell pepper, tomato and mushrooms. cover and simmer 1 hour. remove chicken from pot. add sour cream and sour cream and paprika. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. Oreos or Famous Amos chocolate sandwich cookies, 2 c. cold milk, 1 (4 serving size) pkg. chocolate instant pudding, 1 (8 oz.) tub Cool Whip, 1 pkg. gummy worms
ReferenceRecipe: Crush cookies with rolling pin in a Ziploc bag or by using a food processor. In a medium size bowl, beat pudding mix and milk with wire whisk or on medium speed with a mixer for 2 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes. Stir in Cool Whip and 1/3 of the crushed cookies.
GeneratedRecipe: crumble cookies and mix with 1 tablespoon of milk until smooth. mix pudding and remaining milk in large bowl. beat with wire whisk until well blended. add cool whip and mix well.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 stick margarine, 1/2 c. cocoa, 1 c. peanut butter, 3 c. quick oats, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 4 ingredients and bring to a boil. Remove and add peanut butter, oats and vanilla. Mix well. Drop on waxed paper, 1 teaspoon at a time.
GeneratedRecipe: boil first 4 ingredients for 2 minutes. remove from heat and add next 4 ingredients. stir well. drop mixture by teaspoon onto wax paper to cool.

Ingredients: 10 oz. pkg. chopped broccoli, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1/2 can milk, 1/2 can water (use soup can for measure), 1 c. Velveeta cheese, chunked
ReferenceRecipe: Put all in saucepan and heat over medium heat until cheese has melted and soup is hot.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan. cook on medium heat until cheese melts. stir often.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. prepared horseradish, 2 Tbsp. chopped parsley, 1 c. dairy sour cream, 2 Tbsp. pimento (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Fold horseradish and parsley into sour cream. Serve with roast beef or prime rib.
GeneratedRecipe: mix well and chill. serve with assorted crackers.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. Hidden Valley Ranch, 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, salad seasoning, rye bread (cocktail), 3 cucumbers, sliced 1/4-inch
ReferenceRecipe: Mix Hidden Valley Ranch and cream cheese. Spread on cocktail bread and put on slice of cucumber. Sprinkle with salad seasoning.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese and salad seasoning together. spread on cocktail rye bread. top with cucumber slices.

Ingredients: 5 qt. water, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. cloves, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1 large can frozen orange juice, 1 large can frozen lemonade
ReferenceRecipe: Combine water, sugar, cloves and cinnamon; boil ten minutes. Add orange juice and lemonade (undiluted). Reheat and serve hot.
GeneratedRecipe: cook water, cloves, cinnamon, sugar and orange juice for 15 minutes. add orange juice and lemonade. heat and serve.

Ingredients: 4 (16 oz.) pkg. frozen strawberries (with syrup), 3 cans crushed pineapple, 3 (6 oz.) cans limeade concentrate, 2 bottles dry champagne, up to 64 oz. strawberry seltzer
ReferenceRecipe: Put first 3 ingredients in blender/processor to make a slush. Add dry champagne and strawberry seltzer. Float strawberries, oranges.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in large punch bowl. stir well and freeze.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. soft butter, 2 c. peanut butter (crunchy-style), 1 lb. confectioners sugar, 3 c. Rice Krispies, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips, 1/3 stick (barely) paraffin
ReferenceRecipe: Mix butter, sugar, peanut butter and Rice Krispies; form into 1 1/2 inch balls. Melt chocolate chips and paraffin in a double boiler. Dip balls into chocolate mixture and put on waxed paper until chocolate is set.
GeneratedRecipe: combine butter, peanut butter and sugar. mix well. add rice krispies; mix well. form into small balls and chill. dip in chocolate chips and place on waxed paper until firm. store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 2 slices bread crumbs, 2 small eggs, 3 rounded Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. Old Bay seasoning, 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 lb. lump crab meat, picked, butter
ReferenceRecipe: Blend all ingredients except crab. Add crab meat and toss gently. Mold into cakes and fry in butter until browned. Makes 8 to 10 cakes.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together all ingredients and shape into cakes, using about 3/4-inch thick. roll in bread crumbs. deep fry until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 small pkg. strawberry jello, 1 c. hot water, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 c. whipped cream, 1/4 c. sugar, 1 c. cooked rice
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve jello in hot water. Add salt; chill until it thickens, then add pineapple (juice and all), whipped cream and rice. Chill before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix jello and hot water. add other ingredients. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 box Kraft macaroni and cheese, 1 can corn (Niblets), 1 can French beans, 1 can mushroom soup, 1/4 tsp. dill seed, 1 can French fried onions
ReferenceRecipe: Cook macaroni and drain. Use one cup milk. Add corn, beans, soup and dill seed to macaroni and cheese. Place French fried onions on top.
GeneratedRecipe: cook macaroni and drain well. add soup and dill seed. mix all together and let stand in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. crescent rolls, 1 c. mayonnaise, grated Cheddar cheese, variety of veggies (example: broccoli, cucumbers, cauliflower, green peppers, lettuce, mushrooms, tomatoes, celery, carrots and onions) *, 2 (8 oz.) softened cream cheese, 1 pkg. Ranch dressing
ReferenceRecipe: *Cut veggies small; use 1 cup of 6 kinds of veggies.
GeneratedRecipe: * you can use your favorite broccoli, carrots and cucumbers.

Ingredients: 1/2 box raisins, 3 1/2 c. water, 1 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 c. shortening, 4 c. flour, 1 Tbsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1 tsp. cloves, 1 c. chopped nuts, cherries, powdered sugar icing
ReferenceRecipe: Boil raisins and 2 cups water; drain. Then add 1 1/2 cups cold water to raisins and set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: bring water and raisins to boil. add soda, salt, cloves, cinnamon and cloves. cool. cream shortening and sugar. mix in flour mixture and nuts.

Ingredients: graham crackers, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. sugar, 1 beaten egg, 1/2 c. evaporated milk, 1 c. coconut, 1 c. pecans, 1 c. graham cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Layer row of graham crackers in glass pan (9 x 13-inch); makes 2 1/2 rows. In saucepan, melt the margarine. Add sugar, egg and milk. Stir constantly over medium-high until it boils. Take off and add the coconut, pecans and graham cracker crumbs. Stir until mixed. Pour over crackers. Add another layer of crackers. Pat down.
GeneratedRecipe: cook egg, sugar, margarine and evaporated milk in double boiler until thick. add coconut and pecans. line pan with whole graham crackers. pour mixture over crackers. place in refrigerator for 2 hours.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breast halves, boned and skinned, 1/2 c. crumbled Gorgonzola cheese, 2 eggs, flour, salt and pepper, 1/4 c. unsalted butter, 1 shallot, peeled and minced, 1/2 c. Port wine
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken breasts on flat surface. With sharp knife parallel to surface and beginning at curved edge of chicken breast, cut each lengthwise to within 1/4-inch of opposite edge. Open each piece out flat and sprinkle 2 tablespoons cheese over one-half. Fold second half over cheese and press edges to close. Dip chicken in egg, then flour that has been seasoned to taste. Then finally in bread crumbs to coat lightly.
GeneratedRecipe: cut each chicken breast in half. dredge in flour, salt and pepper. dip chicken in beaten egg mixture and shake off excess. heat 2 tablespoons of the melted butter in a large skillet and cook the chicken for about 3 minutes on each side or until browned on each side. remove to warm serving platter.

Ingredients: 2 lb. hamburg, 1 c. catsup, 2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 tsp. vinegar, 2 tsp. sugar, 2 onions (or 1 large), salt and pepper to suit your taste
ReferenceRecipe: Fry hamburg; drain fat. Mix all together. For smaller portion, cut measurements in half.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburg and onions in frying pan; pour off grease. add remaining ingredients. cook over low heat until onions are cooked.

Ingredients: 3 bunches (stems) broccoli (wash and drain 3 to 4 stems, 2 lb. or more), 1 c. cider vinegar, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. dill weed, 1 Tbsp. Accent, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. coarsely ground pepper, 1 tsp. garlic salt, 1 1/2 c. vegetable oil
ReferenceRecipe: Mix last eight ingredients and pour over raw broccoli. Marinate for 24 hours; place in Tupperware bowl to marinate and turn bowl over once in a while. (Make sure tops on securely before this.) Serve cold.
GeneratedRecipe: wash broccoli and cut into florets. combine all ingredients in large bowl. pour over broccoli. cover and marinate overnight in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 2/3 c. shortening, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. buttermilk, 1 egg white
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the flour, shortening and salt, then add buttermilk and egg white. Beat until stiff. Chill before using. (Can be kept in refrigerator until used.) Fill with filling of your choice. This is the best crust!!
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg white, buttermilk and salt until well blended. add shortening and flour mixture to egg white. beat until smooth. add flour and knead until smooth. roll out on floured surface. cut. fry in hot oil until golden brown.

Ingredients: 4 c. flour, 1 c. nonfat dry milk, 2 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 4 Tbsp. shortening, 1 1/2 c. warm water
ReferenceRecipe: For smaller portions, recipe may be cut in half.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, dry ingredients. cut in shortening with pastry blender or a fork until it resembles coarse meal. add warm water; mix lightly.

Ingredients: 1 lb. vermicelli, break into 2-inch lengths, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 c. chopped bell pepper, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 2 tomatoes, chopped, 1 can pimento, drained, 1 Tbsp. Accent, 4 Tbsp. lemon juice, 8 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 pt. mayonnaise, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Cook vermicelli according to directions and drain. In bowl place chopped celery, bell pepper, onions, tomatoes and drained pimento. Add vermicelli to vegetables. Add lemon juice, Accent, salt, pepper and olive oil. Toss all ingredients together. Add mayonnaise (I do not use the full pint) according to taste. Refrigerate until ready to serve. The longer it is in the refrigerator the better it tastes.
GeneratedRecipe: cook vermicelli as directed. drain and cool. add other ingredients. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1 c. plus 2 tsp. butter, divided, 2 cups brown sugar, 2 eggs, 4 tsp. vanilla, divided, 3 cups quick cooking oats, 2 1/2 cups flour, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, divided, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 can sweetened condensed milk, 2 cups chocolate chips, 1 cup nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Cream butter and brown sugar. Beat in eggs and 2 tsp. vanilla. Combine oats, flour, 1 tsp. salt and baking soda, stir into creamed mixture. Press 2/3 of oat mixture into greased 15x10 inch baking pan. In a pan, combine milk, chips and remaining butter and salt. Cook and stir over low heat until chocolate is melted. Remove from the heat, stir in walnuts and remaining vanilla. Spread over crust. Sprinkle with remaining mixture. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 350 degrees. preheat oven to 350 degrees. grease a 9 x 13 pan. in a medium bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking soda, and salt. beat butter, brown sugar, eggs, vanilla and milk. stir in dry ingredients. mix well.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. 80% olive oil, 3 to 4 onions, chopped, 2 cloves garlic, chopped, 2 (12 oz.) cans tomato paste, 2 (12 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 1 (12 oz.) can water, 2 to 3 Tbsp. white sugar, salt and pepper to taste, pinch of sweet basil
ReferenceRecipe: Brown onions in oil. Add garlic, tomato paste, tomato sauce and water. Boil 1/2 hour, stirring often. Add sugar, salt, pepper and sweet basil. Cook over low heat for 1 1/2 hours, stirring often.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion and garlic in olive oil. add remaining ingredients to taste except basil. simmer for 1 1/2 hours. add sweet pepper and simmer for 1 hour. add basil. serve over spaghetti.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. lemon flavored gelatin, 1 c. boiling water, 3 tsp. lemon juice, 1 (8 oz.) or 3 (3 oz.) Philadelphia brand cream cheese, softened, 1 c. sugar (1/2 c. is enough), 1 can Carnation milk, chilled and whipped, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve gelatin in boiling water. Add lemon juice. Cool. Cream together cream cheese, sugar and vanilla. Add gelatin. Mix well. Fold in whipped milk. Pour into dish lined with vanilla wafers or Graham Cracker Crust.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatin in boiling water. cool. combine cream cheese, sugar, vanilla and lemon juice and whip. add milk and blend. fold into gelatin mixture. pour in a 9 x 9-inch pan. chill.

Ingredients: 3 eggs, 1 c. raisins, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 c. butter, 1 c. brown sugar, 1 c. sugar, 2 1/2 c. flour, 1 tsp. salt, 2 tsp. cinnamon, 2 tsp. baking soda, 2 c. oatmeal
ReferenceRecipe: Soak raisins in eggs and vanilla for 1 hour. Cream together butter and sugars until fluffy. Mix flour, salt, cinnamon and baking soda together. Add to butter and sugar mixture. Stir in raisins and oatmeal.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together butter, sugar and eggs. sift together dry ingredients. add to butter mixture and blend well. add oatmeal. mix well. add raisins and vanilla.

Ingredients: 1 (20 oz.) can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip, 1 can whole cranberry sauce, 1 or 2 squirts lemon juice, 1 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together and pour into 9 x 13 casserole dish. Chill and serve. May be frozen for later use.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and put in a 9 x 9-inch pan. chill for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 or 2 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined, 1/2 c. olive oil, 4 cloves garlic, minced, 1 tsp. salt or to taste, 1/2 tsp. oregano, 1 tsp. parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oil and seasonings; add shrimp. Cook 8 to 10 minutes. Serve over rice or your favorite pasta. The amount of shrimp used is optional. Less is better if using fresh pasta.
GeneratedRecipe: cut shrimp into quarters with a knife. heat olive oil in a large skillet. add shrimp. cook until lightly browned. add garlic and saute 5 minutes. add salt, oregano and oregano. cover and simmer about 10 minutes. remove shrimp from heat and let stand for 2 minutes. sprinkle with parsley.

Ingredients: 2 envelopes Knox gelatine, 1 c. Clamato juice, 1 small can V-8 juice (hot and spicy), 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 cans drained shrimp, 1 c. mayonnaise, 6 drops Tabasco sauce, 1 c. (total) chopped green pepper, chopped onions and chopped celery
ReferenceRecipe: Place gelatine, Clamato juice and V-8 juice in a small pan; mix well and bring to a boil. In a bowl, add rest of ingredients and mix well with a fork. Add 6 drops of Tabasco sauce. Pour in a well-oiled mold. Refrigerate overnight. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: heat v-8 juice and cream cheese together in saucepan until melted. add gelatin and stir until melted. add rest of ingredients. pour into a mold. chill overnight.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. water, 2 heaping Tbsp. cornstarch, 2 heaping Tbsp. dry strawberry jello, 1 pie shell, bake and cool, Dream Whip Topping, fresh strawberries (to fill pie shell)
ReferenceRecipe: Make sauce by combining sugar, cornstarch and water. Cook until thick. Stir the strawberry jello into the hot sauce. Cool 1 hour. Fill the baked pie shell with fresh berries (slice them if they are large). Pour the sauce over the berries. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cornstarch and water. cook until clear and clear. add jello and stir. cool. add fresh strawberries. pour jello over them. pour into pie shell. chill and serve with dream whip.

Ingredients: 9 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/2 c. cold water, 5 egg whites, at room temperature, 3/4 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 tsp. cream of tartar
ReferenceRecipe: Combine 2 tablespoons sugar, cornstarch and cold water in saucepan. Stir until cornstarch dissolves. Cook mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat when mixture is thick and clear. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cornstarch, water and cream of tartar in saucepan; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture forms a ball. cool until thick and smooth. beat egg whites until stiff. add vanilla and beat until stiff enough to spread.

Ingredients: 1 c. crushed pineapple, 2 pkg. lime or lemon jello, 1 lb. cottage cheese, 1 small jar chopped maraschino cherries, 1/2 c. chopped nuts (optional), 1/2 pt. cream, whipped stiff (fold in last)
ReferenceRecipe: Heat pineapple and dissolve jello in pineapple; let set until partly congealed. Add the rest of the ingredients. Chill and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix jello, pineapple and cottage cheese together. add other ingredients. chill until set.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. Jiffy cornbread mix, 1 can creamed corn
ReferenceRecipe: Mix and bake as directed. You may double the recipe for serving more people. Serves 8 people. Serves 16 if doubled.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together in a medium bowl. bake as directed on box and serve.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry jello, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 c. sugar, 2 c. water, strawberries, cooked pie shell
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the jello, cornstarch and sugar together. Add the water. Bring mixture to a boil. Let cool until partially set; mix. Pour over berries in cooked pie shell. Chill. Serve with whipped cream.
GeneratedRecipe: combine jello, water, sugar, jello and cornstarch in saucepan. cook until thick. cool. pour over sliced strawberries; pour into crust. chill. serve with cool whip.

Ingredients: 1 c. sliced okra, 1 lb. ground beef, salt and pepper to taste, 1 small onion, chopped or 1 tsp. onion powder, 1 c. water, 1 c. uncooked rice
ReferenceRecipe: Cook okra in small amount of oil until done. Cook ground beef until slightly brown. Add okra, seasonings, onion and water. Simmer until 30 minutes before steaming. Add rice and enough water to steam rice. Cook until rice is tender.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onion, salt and pepper in skillet. drain grease. add okra and okra. simmer 20 minutes. add okra. cover and cook until okra is tender. add water to okra, salt and pepper. simmer until rice is tender and tender.

Ingredients: 1 bag egg noodles, 1 can mushroom soup, 1 large round steak, 1/2 c. milk, 1 (12 oz.) sour cream, 1 Tbsp. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Cut round steak into bite-size pieces. Fry in oil until done. Cook egg noodles; drain. Mix sour cream, mushroom soup and milk and heat thoroughly. Put meat in sauce; cook 5 minutes more. Pour over cooked noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: cut meat into thin slices. brown in oil. add soups and milk. cover and simmer until noodles are done. stir in sour cream and heat through. serve over noodles.

Ingredients: 1 lg. can carnation milk, 2 c. sugar, 3 squares unsweetened chocolate, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Bring to a boil all ingredients. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes. Stirring until chocolate melts. Remove from heat; add vanilla. Beat with rotary beater until thick. Serve hot or cold. Great on ice cream.
GeneratedRecipe: heat all ingredients to boiling, stirring constantly. cook over medium heat until it starts to thicken. cool. add vanilla. spread on cake.

Ingredients: 3 qt. freshly popped popcorn, 1/2 c. butter, 1 c. firmly packed brown sugar, 1/4 c. light corn syrup, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. baking soda, 1/2 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Place popcorn in a lightly greased 4-quart casserole dish; set aside. Place butter in a 1 1/2-quart dish. Microwave on High for 1 minute or until melted. Stir in brown sugar, corn syrup and salt; cover and microwave on High for 4 minutes. Remove mixture from microwave; stir in soda and vanilla. Pour over popcorn; stir until all is coated. Cook popcorn mixture on High for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes, stirring well after each minute. Remove from oven; stir well. Spread in a lightly buttered 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan; cool thoroughly. Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.
GeneratedRecipe: place sugar, butter, syrup and salt in a 2-quart bowl. microwave on high for 4 to 5 minutes. stir well. microwave on high for 2 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes. add baking soda and vanilla. pour mixture over popcorn. mix well. spread on wax paper to cool, then break up.

Ingredients: 2 lb. carrots, peeled, sliced and cooked until tender, 1 medium onion, sliced thin, 1 medium green pepper, sliced thin, 1 can tomato soup, 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1/4 c. Wesson oil, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Bring tomato soup, sugar, vinegar, oil and Worcestershire sauce to a boil. Pour over carrots (drained), onion and bell pepper. Marinate overnight in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix and marinate overnight. will keep in refrigerator.

Ingredients: pan stock from roast pork, 1/2 c. condensed tomato soup, 1/4 c. flour, 2 c. water, salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Leave 1/4 cup stock in pan. Blend flour and add water gradually, stirring constantly. Cook until thickened. Stir in tomato soup and season with salt and pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: put roast in crock-pot. cook on low 6 to 8 hours. remove meat, cut into small pieces. place in crock-pot along with other ingredients. cook on low for 3 to 4 hours. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 4 Tbsp. butter, 8 oz. sliced, fresh mushrooms, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 (16 oz.) bag frozen cut broccoli, thawed, 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, 1 tsp. oregano, 1 lb. Hillshire Farm smoked sausage (bite-size pieces), 1/2 c. Parmesan cheese, 1 pkg. rotini pasta
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in a large skillet. Stir-fry mushrooms, onion and broccoli, sprinkled with garlic powder and oregano, until vegetables are cooked, yet still firm. (Do not overcook.)
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta in butter until tender, about 5 minutes; drain. add mushrooms and onion; cook 2 minutes. add pasta. cook and stir 2 minutes more. add remaining ingredients. toss. serve with parmesan cheese.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. soft bread crumbs, 3/4 c. milk, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together; shape into small balls.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and form into loaf pan. bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until done.

Ingredients: 3 tsp. butter, 3 tart apples, peeled and sliced, 1/2 c. honey, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: In medium skillet over medium heat, melt the butter until foaming. Add apples, cook 2 minutes, tossing occasionally. Add honey and sprinkle spices over apples. Toss gently to combine. Cook until apples are tender, then serve while hot.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in skillet. add apples; cook until tender. add honey and spices. cook until apples are cooked. serve warm.

Ingredients: 2 cups sugar, 1/2 cup 2 % milk, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 cup peanut butter, 4 Tbsp. cocoa (optional), 1 cup nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar and milk. Bring to a full boil. Boil 1 minute. Take off heat. Let stand 5 minutes. Add butter, peanut butter, and vanilla.
GeneratedRecipe: mix the first 6 ingredients. boil 1 minute. add peanut butter and vanilla. stir until it begins to thicken. add nuts, if desired. pour into a buttered pan.

Ingredients: 1/3 c. shortening, 1/2 c. honey or corn syrup, 2/3 c. peanut butter, 1 egg, 2 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. soda, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. peanuts, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Mix shortening, sugar, honey, peanut butter and egg thoroughly. Measure flour and blend dry ingredients. Stir into shortening mixture. Stir in nuts. Shape into a strip about 10 x 2 1/2 x 1 1/2-inch. Wrap in wax paper; store in the refrigerator for several hours. Bake as needed.
GeneratedRecipe: cream peanut butter and shortening; add honey, corn syrup and egg. sift together flour, salt, soda and baking powder; blend well. stir in peanuts.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 3 cloves garlic, 1 large Spanish onion, 4 large tomatoes, chopped, 2 bay leaves, 1/4 tsp. black pepper, 1 tsp. paprika, 1/4 c. white cooking wine, 1 1/2 lb. sliced red skin potatoes (uncooked), 2 lb. tuna steak, cut in 1-inch chunks
ReferenceRecipe: In a 12-inch pan, saute garlic in oil. Add onion and saute until translucent. Add tomatoes, bay leaves, black pepper and paprika. Let simmer 5 minutes. Add wine, potatoes and tuna. Cover and let simmer on low flame approximately 30 minutes. Serves 5.
GeneratedRecipe: heat olive oil in large skillet. add garlic and saute for 5 minutes. add onion and cook 2 minutes. add tomatoes, wine, bay leaves, bay leaves and black pepper. cover and simmer for 20 minutes. add tuna, cover and cook until tender. remove and add salt and pepper to taste. serve with hot buttered noodles. serves 4 to 6 people.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, slightly beaten, 1/2 c. sugar, pinch of salt, 1/2 c. pineapple juice, 1/2 c. finely chopped celery, 1/2 c. crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. walnuts, 2 unpeeled apples, chopped, 2 c. whipped topping
ReferenceRecipe: In saucepan, over medium heat, combine eggs, sugar, salt and juice. Cook, stirring, until thick. Cool. Add celery, pineapple, nuts and apples. Fold in whipped cream and freeze. Place in refrigerator for about two hours before serving. May be refrozen. This keeps several months in freezer.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, eggs, pineapple juice and salt in saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick and clear. remove from heat. stir in pineapple and nuts. cool. fold in whipped topping. pour into a large dish. chill until ready to serve. serves 8.

Ingredients: 3 c. sifted self-rising flour, 1 Tbsp. paprika, 2 pkg. Lipton tomato soup mix, 2 pkg. Good Seasons salad mix, 1 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Coat chicken with mix. Bake on greased cookie sheet.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together in a large mixing bowl. use as a spread for corn meal and use.

Ingredients: 1 (20 oz.) pkg. Oreo cookies, crushed, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1/4 c. margarine, softened, 1 large Cool Whip (16 oz.), 2 (3 1/2 oz.) pkg. vanilla instant pudding, 3 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Bowl 1: Mix cream cheese, margarine and Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: combine crushed cookies, melted butter and press firmly into bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: 2 c. graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 c. sugar, 1/4 c. margarine or butter, melted, 2 c. powdered sugar, 2/3 c. creamy peanut butter, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 c. milk, 1 (12 oz.) container frozen whipped topping, thawed, 3/4 c. Spanish peanuts
ReferenceRecipe: In small bowl, combine sugar, crumbs and margarine. Press into 13 x 9-inch baking dish. In small mixer bowl, beat powdered sugar, peanut butter and cream cheese at medium speed, scraping bowl often until smooth (1 to 2 minutes). At low speed, gradually beat in milk. Fold in whipped topping. Spread over crust. Sprinkle with peanuts. Freeze 3 hours or until serving time. Makes 18 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in a 13 x 9-inch pan. mix in crumbs and sugar. pat in pan.

Ingredients: 2 c. wide egg noodles, 3 Tbsp. bacon grease, 1 c. chopped onion, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 c. cooked, diced carrots, 2 1/4 c. (No. 2 can) whole tomatoes, 2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Peel, dice and cook carrots until done. Cook noodles according to package directions; drain. Add onion and celery to grease in Dutch oven and saute about 5 minutes. Add broken up ground beef; brown. Combine all ingredients to beef in Dutch oven. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are blended.
GeneratedRecipe: brown meat and onions in grease. add other ingredients. simmer for 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 pkg (8 ounces each) cream cheese, 1 pkg (4 ounces) blue cheese, 2 Tbsp. chopped chives, 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, parsley, chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Have cheese at room temperature, mix all ingredients well. Chill then form into a ball. Roll in parsley and chopped nuts. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients, except parsley. form into a ball and roll in parsley. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 pita bread (6 to 8-inch), 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1/4 Tbsp. chopped jalapeno pepper, 4 sliced ripe tomatoes, halved, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. sliced ham, 2 pitted olives, sliced (optional), alfalfa sprouts (optional), 1/8 Tbsp. ground cumin
ReferenceRecipe: Cut pita bread into 8 wedges and lightly toast. In small bowl, combine mayonnaise, cumin and jalapeno pepper. Spread each wedge with a dab of the mayonnaise mixture. Top with half sliced tomato and 2 slices of your favorite ham. Garnish with a slice of olive and a few sprouts. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: combine first 3 ingredients; spread on pita bread. top with tomatoes and ripe olives. broil 5 minutes or until golden brown. serve on toasted pita bread.

Ingredients: 1 lb. apricots, diced and ground fine, 1/2 c. nuts, ground, 2/3 can Eagle Brand milk, coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together first 3 ingredients. Roll in balls, then roll in coconut.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together. shape into small balls and chill. makes 2 dozen.

Ingredients: 4 pork chops, 2 (8 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 1 1/2 c. water, 1/4 c. onion, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. uncooked regular rice
ReferenceRecipe: Brown pork chops and onions in oil. Drain grease and remove chops. Stir in remaining ingredients and add chops. Bring to a boil. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: brown the chops in large skillet. sprinkle rice with salt and water. cover and cook slowly for 1 hour or until rice is tender. add onion, tomato sauce and brown sugar. cover and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours.

Ingredients: 2 envelopes Knox gelatine, 1 large angel food cake, 1 c. sugar, shredded coconut, 4 envelopes Dream Whip, 1 large can crushed pineapple (undrained), 1 to 2 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve gelatine in 4 tablespoons cold water. Add 1 cup boiling water, lemon juice and pineapple with juice and sugar. Refrigerate until it begins to jell. Tear half of angel food cake into small pieces and spread over bottom of a 9 x 13-inch cake pan. Whip 2 envelopes Dream Whip and fold into gelatine mixture. Pour over cake in pan. Tear other half of cake into small pieces and spread over mixture in pan. Press down lightly. Whip remaining 2 envelopes Dream Whip and spread on top. Cover with shredded coconut. Chill overnight. Serves 13 to 20.
GeneratedRecipe: bring pineapple and sugar to a boil. remove from heat and add gelatine. stir until dissolved. add lemon juice. let cool. add dream whip ( if you like it, add a little water ). mix well with cake. break into small pieces. layer cake in pan. cover with mixture. top with coconut and sprinkle with chopped coconut. chill.

Ingredients: 1 large can crushed pineapple, 1 (3 oz.) instant pistachio pudding, 1 c. miniature marshmallows, 1 small container Cool Whip, 1 c. pecan pieces, 1 jar cut-up maraschino cherries
ReferenceRecipe: Mix pineapple and pudding; add marshmallows, Cool Whip, pecans and cherries. Chill. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding as directed on box. stir in cool whip and drained pineapple. fold in cherries and nuts. chill.

Ingredients: 3 1/2 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 2/3 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 c. raisins, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 1/2 c. buttermilk, 2 Tbsp. butter, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Stir the dry ingredients together. Add raisins and coat them well. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, buttermilk and butter. Add to flour mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and pour into a large greased and floured loaf pan.

Ingredients: 5 (3 oz.) pkg. jello, 5 c. sugar, 84 oz. unsweetened pineapple juice, 1 pt. lemon juice (real lemon or equivalent), 18 oz. grapefruit juice, 4 qt. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: May use any flavor gelatin. Dissolve jello in 5 cups boiling water. Add all other ingredients. Freeze. Keeps well. Set out of freezer 3 to 4 hours before serving (sometimes you have to chop with wooden spoon). Add 6 quarts 7-Up and 2 quarts ginger ale when serving. No need for ice or ice rings. Stays cold. Makes at least 150 punch cups.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except lemon juice. freeze. remove from freezer 1 hour before serving.

Ingredients: 1 box banana instant pudding mix, 2 boxes vanilla instant pudding mix, 1 (12 oz.) carton Cool Whip, 4 c. milk, 8 oz. sour cream, 3 bananas, sliced, 1 large box vanilla wafers
ReferenceRecipe: Mix pudding and milk; mix in sour cream and 1/2 of the Cool Whip. In a very large bowl, put 1 layer of vanilla wafers, layer of pudding mixture and layer of bananas. Repeat layers. Top with remainder of Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding and milk together, then add sour cream and cool whip. layer wafers, bananas and wafers in a casserole dish.

Ingredients: 2 qt. onions, 3 qt. green tomatoes, 6 hot peppers, 2 Tbsp. celery seed, 2 Tbsp. allspice, 2 Tbsp. ground cloves, 2 medium heads cabbage, 6 bell peppers, 1/3 c. salt, 8 c. sugar, 2/3 c. ground mustard, 2 Tbsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Chop all vegetables fine. Mix with salt and let stand 24 hours. Drain off brine. Squeeze vegetables and add other ingredients. Mix thoroughly. Add good vinegar to cover. Simmer for 1 hour, keeping covered closely. Pack into hot dry jars and seal. Makes approximately 14 half-pints.
GeneratedRecipe: grind and mix the first five ingredients in a large pot. mix with the other ingredients and let boil for 1 hour. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: banana, raspberry yogurt or any other flavor, graham cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Cut banana into pieces easy for a child to get a fork into and also into their mouths! Put some yogurt in a small bowl. Put graham cracker crumbs in another bowl. (Used T.V. dinner trays work great.) Let child fork banana pieces, then dip into yogurt, crumbs and pop into mouth. Be imaginative, coconut flakes, etc. may be substituted.
GeneratedRecipe: slice banana slices into a glass. top with yogurt and sprinkle with a little raspberry juice.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. ground cinnamon, 1 Tbsp. allspice, 2 Tbsp. cloves, 1 Tbsp. nutmeg, 1 c. applesauce
ReferenceRecipe: Combine the first 4 ingredients. Blend well. Stir in applesauce. It will be thick. Roll out 1/4-inch thick. Cut with cookie cutter and lay on brown paper. Let dry for 4 to 5 days, uncovered. While wet, take a toothpick and cut hole for ribbon. Smaller cookie cutters work best. Use spatula to place on brown paper.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients. divide dough into 8 parts and roll out to 1/4-inch thickness. cut with desired shapes. place on cookie sheet. let dry for several hours or overnight. slice in 1/4-inch thick slices. store in air tight container.

Ingredients: 15 graham crackers, 15 soda crackers, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. margarine, 1/4 c. chopped nutmeats (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Crush together graham and soda crackers; combine with brown sugar, margarine and nutmeats. Press into the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan and reserve 1 cup for the top.	Chill while preparing the filling.
GeneratedRecipe: place graham crackers on cookie sheet and place in freezer for 10 minutes before you are making them in the freezer.

Ingredients: 3 lb. ground beef, 1 Tbsp. butter, 2 (15 oz.) cans chili beans
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef in butter in 12-inch Dutch oven. Add beans and cook over low heat for 15 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown beef in butter. drain excess fat. add beans. simmer 30 to 45 minutes, stirring often. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) pkg. chopped broccoli, 1/4 c. chopped onion, 2 grated carrots, 1 c. sour cream, 1 can cream of mushroom soup (can use cream of chicken), 2 pkg. Stove Top stuffing with rice, 3/4 c. melted butter, 1 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Boil the broccoli and onion 5 minutes and then drain. Add grated carrot, sour cream and soup. Combine the 2 packages Stove Top stuffing with the melted butter.
GeneratedRecipe: combine stuffing, sour cream, onion and carrots. mix well.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. bologna, 1/2 lb. cheese (any kind), 1 small onion, 1/8 green pepper, 6 small sweet pickles, 1/2 tsp. salt, 6 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. prepared mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Grind bologna, cheese, onion, pepper and pickles in a bowl. Add other ingredients and mix well.
GeneratedRecipe: grind bologna. add remaining ingredients. mix well. serve on crackers.

Ingredients: 6 oz. well-chilled Monterey Jack cheese, shredded, 1 large head romaine lettuce (1 lb.), torn into bite-sized pieces, 1 small head red lettuce (6 oz.), torn into bite-sized pieces, 1 Tbsp. walnut oil or vegetable oil, 3/4 c. walnuts, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Heat walnut oil in heavy 6-inch skillet over medium-low heat. Add walnuts and cook until brown, stirring frequently, about 5 minutes. Cool. Combine with both lettuces and cheese in large bowl. Just before serving, add vinaigrette and toss.
GeneratedRecipe: toss together lettuce, walnuts and cheese. in a large salad bowl, combine oil and oil; stir until well coated. drizzle over lettuce and sprinkle with nuts. serves 8.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 1 c. shortening, 1 c. sugar, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1 tsp. almond extract
ReferenceRecipe: Cut shortening into dry ingredients. Add beaten egg and almond extract. Mix, knead until soft. Form into little balls, flatten with hand. The sign of the Chinese Almond Cookie is a red dot in the center of the cookie, which is made with red food coloring. Use a chopstick and dot it!
GeneratedRecipe: mix first 4 ingredients together. add egg, almond extract and almond extract, then add enough flour to make a soft dough. roll out on floured board until thin. cut in squares and place on a greased cookie sheet. bake at 375 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (No. 2) can pineapple chunks, drained, 2 or 3 sliced oranges, 1 large apple, chunked, 3 bananas, sliced, 1/2 lb. seedless grapes, halved, 1/2 c. pineapple juice, 1/4 c. lemon juice, 1/4 lb. cheese (Cheddar or American), diced, 1 c. pecans (optional), 1/3 c. sugar, 1 whole egg plus 1 egg yolk
ReferenceRecipe: Beat well the egg and egg yolk. Cook egg, sugar, pineapple juice and lemon juice in double boiler until thick. When cool, pour over remaining ingredients. Chill. At Christmastime, add red and green cherries.
GeneratedRecipe: mix first 6 ingredients. beat egg yolk until thick, lemon juice and lemon juice is clear. pour over fruit and nuts. toss to coat. chill several hours. serve with whipped cream or cool whip.

Ingredients: 1 lb. lean hamburger, 1 box frozen baby carrots, 1 large onion, 2 large potatoes, salt
ReferenceRecipe: You will need aluminum foil, 4 pieces, 12 x 12-inches.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger in a large pan. add salt and onion and cook until soft. add frozen potatoes and cook until done. add frozen potatoes, carrots and carrots. cook until potatoes and potatoes are done.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. instant lemon flavored tea, 1 to 1 1/2 c. sugar, 2 c. Tang, 2 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. ground cloves, 1 small pkg. sweetened lemonade mix
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all of the ingredients. Use 2 teaspoons of tea mixture to 1 cup hot water.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients and store in tight jar. to serve, add 2 heaping teaspoons per cup of hot water.

Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1/2 c. milk, 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Stir up and put in muffin tin.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. use as dip with vegetable or chicken.

Ingredients: 2 hard-boiled eggs, 3 to 4 Tbsp. self-rising flour, approximately 5 Tbsp. Crisco, salt and pepper as desired
ReferenceRecipe: Boil eggs for chipping up in gravy. Peel and place aside.
GeneratedRecipe: cut eggs into small pieces; mix with flour and salt. add enough crisco to make a ball. roll out and cut into squares. fry in deep fat until golden brown. drain on paper towel.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. butter, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. white sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1 1/8 c. flour, 1/2 (12 oz.) bag chocolate chips, 1/2 tsp. baking soda, 1/2 c. walnuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: In a small pan, melt the butter. While it's hot, add both sugars. Let cool. While the butter mixture is cooling, mix the flour, soda and salt in a bowl. Beat the egg and add egg and vanilla to butter mixture. Stir. Add the butter mixture to the flour mixture. Stir again, then add chocolate chips and nuts. Stir everything well and put into the fridge to cool for 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together the dry ingredients. cream the butter and sugars until fluffy. add egg and beat well. add chips. stir in walnuts and chocolate chips. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) roll sausage, 3 Tbsp. flour, milk, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/4 tsp. sage
ReferenceRecipe: Brown sausage in skillet. Chop sausage into small chunks. After browning sausage, drain fat, reserving 3 tablespoons of fat. Add the flour; brown flour and fat. Add drained sausage. After mixture has been browned, gradually add milk; simmer until thickened. Add pepper and sage while gravy is simmering.
GeneratedRecipe: fry sausage, then drain. in a separate pan, cook sausage. add flour and pepper. stir until smooth. add milk and cook until thickened. add sage and sausage. pour into dish. bake at 350 degrees for 30 - 40 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 1/3 c. graham cracker crumbs, 3 Tbsp. sugar, 1/4 c. soft butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Mix crumbs with sugar. Blend in butter. Press firmly in bottom and sides of 9-inch pie pan.
GeneratedRecipe: blend all ingredients. spread in an 8-inch square pan.

Ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) pkg. Nestle butterscotch morsels (1 c.), 1/3 c. sweetened condensed milk, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/3 c. chopped pecans, slightly beaten egg white, pecan halves
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butterscotch morsels over hot water; remove from stove. Stir in condensed milk and vanilla. Add chopped pecans; mix well. Chill until firm enough to handle. Form into 12-inch roll on waxed paper. Roll tightly in waxed paper to shape evenly. Unroll and mark surface lengthwise with tines of fork; brush with egg white. Press pecan halves into roll to completely cover surface. Wrap in wax paper. Chill. Cut in 1/2-inch slices with sharp knife. Makes 2 dozen slices (approximately).
GeneratedRecipe: melt butterscotch morsels in top of double boiler. add sweetened condensed milk, egg yolks and vanilla. stir. add nuts; stir until well blended. drop by teaspoon on wax paper. chill until firm.

Ingredients: 4 whole chicken breasts, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. sugar, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 5 Tbsp. cooking oil, 1/2 c. cashews, 1 c. diced ham, 1 c. hot chicken broth
ReferenceRecipe: Cut chicken into 1 1/2-inch squares. Mix cornstarch, pepper, sugar, 1 tablespoon soy sauce and 2 tablespoons oil. Add chicken; stir to coat evenly. Saute nuts until golden in 1 tablespoon oil. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt. Heat remaining oil. Add chicken mixture; stir-fry for 2 minutes. Add ham. Stir in remaining soy sauce and broth, scraping up brown bits from bottom of pan. Cook 1 minute longer. Serve over rice.
GeneratedRecipe: brown chicken breasts in hot cooking oil. remove from pan. add soy sauce, sugar, cornstarch and soy sauce. cook, stirring constantly until thick. add hot pepper and cashews; stir until smooth. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. flour, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. corn meal, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. milk, 2 1/2 c. chopped onion
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dry ingredients. Add milk and mix. Add onion and stir to coat. Drop by teaspoon in hot oil or fat. Fry until golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. drop by spoonfuls into hot oil. fry until brown. drain and serve.

Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, tear into pieces, 1/2 head cauliflower, separate florets, 2 carrots, grated, 2 stalks celery, sliced, 1 c. frozen peas, thaw with cold water, drain, 1 to 1 1/2 c. grated Colby cheese, 1/2 lb. fried bacon, crumbled, 4 to 6 hard-boiled eggs, sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Layer first five ingredients. Add Colby cheese, bacon and hard-boiled eggs. Make dressing.
GeneratedRecipe: layer all ingredients in large bowl. mix 1 cup cold water and pour over top of vegetables. cover tightly and refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 can shrimp, mashed, 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 Tbsp. catsup, 2 Tbsp. mayo, 1/8 tsp. onion powder
ReferenceRecipe: Combine and chill. Serve with chips or crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients and spread on crackers.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. all-purpose flour, 1 c. quick cooking rolled oats, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. salt (optional), 2 eggs, slightly beaten, 1 1/2 c. milk, 6 Tbsp. butter, melted, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 1/2 c. chopped pecans (optional), 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: In large bowl, stir together flour, oats, baking powder, cinnamon and salt; set aside. In small bowl, stir together eggs, milk, butter and brown sugar. Add to flour mixture; stir until blended. Pour batter onto grids of preheated lightly greased waffle iron (amount will vary according to size of waffle iron). Sprinkle a few chopped pecans on top of batter; close lid quickly; do not open during baking.
