Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 2 Tbsp. water, 1/2 c. margarine or butter
ReferenceRecipe: Cut butter into flour as for pie crust. Add water to make a soft dough. Divide into 2 strips 12/2 on an ungreased cookie sheet.
GeneratedRecipe: mix butter and flour together. add water. stir until mixture is smooth. add enough water to make a ball and roll out on floured board. cut into 1-inch squares. cook until tender.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. Duncan Hines lemon supreme cake mix, 1 (4 serving size) pkg. lime gelatin, 1 envelope whipped topping mix (2 to 2 1/2 c. yield), 1 (4 serving size) pkg. lemon instant pudding mix, 1 1/2 c. cold milk
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve gelatins in 3/4 cup boiling water. Add 1/2 cup cold water; set aside. Mix and bake cake as directed in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Cool 20 to 25 minutes. Poke deep holes about 1 inch apart in cake (still in pan) with a meat fork. Pour gelatin mixture into holes. Refrigerate cake.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare cake mix as directed on package. bake in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. cool. poke holes in cake with wooden spoon handle of fork. pour 1 cup milk over cake. let stand 3 minutes. combine milk and pudding mix; beat on medium speed for 30 seconds. add whipped topping and beat until blended. pour over cake. chill 4 hours.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) loaf frozen bread dough, thawed, 3 Tbsp. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 1/4 c. butter or margarine, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Cut dough in 16 equal pieces. Shape in balls. Place on floured surface; cover. Let rest 10 minutes. Stir Parmesan and garlic powder into melted butter, using spoon. Roll balls in butter mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw bread dough and cut into 3 equal pieces. place in a large bowl. add cheese and garlic powder to dough. stir in cheese and butter. cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 4 oz. fine egg noodles, 1/2 c. sour cream, 1/2 c. plain yogurt, 1 1/2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 (16 oz.) pkg. frozen seafood mix, thawed, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1 1/2 Tbsp. minced onion, 2 tsp. dried parsley flakes, 2 tsp. freeze-dried chives, 1/4 tsp. seasoned salt, leaf lettuce
ReferenceRecipe: Cook egg noodles according to package directions; drain. Rinse with cold water; drain. Set aside. Combine sour cream and next 3 ingredients, mixing well. Combine noodles, sour cream mixture, seafood mix and next 6 ingredients, mixing well. Chill 8 hours. Arrange on lettuce-lined plates. Garnish, if desired. Garnish: tomato wedges, parsley sprigs.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine noodles, celery, onion, lemon juice, sour cream, worcestershire sauce and worcestershire sauce. toss to coat.

Ingredients: 1 lb. shrimp (medium), 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/3 tsp. basil, 1/4 c. butter or margarine, 2 Tbsp. minced garlic, 1/2 tsp. oregano, 1/4 c. select olive oil
ReferenceRecipe: De-shell shrimp and butterfly. Dry thoroughly. Heat ingredients in frying pan and when very hot, add shrimp. Stir constantly, cooking for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes. Serve with French roll and wine.
GeneratedRecipe: heat butter and olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. add garlic and basil. cook, stirring constantly, until shrimp is opaque, about 5 minutes. add salt and oregano. cover and cook 5 minutes or until shrimp are pink, stirring occasionally. serve immediately. serves 4.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. flour, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. milk, 1 large can sliced peaches, 1/2 c. butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Melt 1/2 cup butter or margarine in oblong cake pan. Sift together sugar, flour, baking powder and salt. Mix 3/4 cup milk with dry ingredients. Pour over melted butter in cake pan.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in 9 x 13-inch pan. add sugar. mix together milk, flour, salt and baking powder. spread over fruit. sprinkle peaches over batter. bake 25 to 30 minutes or until crust is golden brown.

Ingredients: tortilla chips, refried beans, 8 oz. sour cream, lettuce, chopped, tomato, chopped, onion, chopped, black olives, sliced, taco sauce, cheese, shredded
ReferenceRecipe: Layer in order on tray. Refrigerate until ready to use.
GeneratedRecipe: spread refried beans on serving dish; spread refried beans over beans. combine sour cream and taco sauce in small bowl. spread on sour cream mixture. add onion, olives, black olives and cheese. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 2 3/4 c. water, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 box strawberry jello, 3 pkg. Knox gelatine, 1 can frozen guava juice
ReferenceRecipe: Boil 2 cups of water. Add sugar to boiling water and stir until sugar dissolves; add jello. In another bowl, melt gelatine in 3/4 cup cold water. Pour jello mixture into gelatine mixture and add guava juice. Pour into 8 x 8-inch pan and refrigerate overnight. Cut and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatine in 1 cup boiling water. mix with other ingredients and freeze.

Ingredients: 4 (5 oz.) boneless chicken breasts, 1 1/2 oz. Frangelica liqueur, 1 oz. brandy, 4 oz. heavy cream, 1/4 c. mushrooms, 1/2 Tbsp. shallots
ReferenceRecipe: Saute chicken breasts. Add Frangelica and brandy. Slowly stir in cream. Add mushrooms and shallots. Simmer slowly for 10 minutes. Rice pilaf makes a nice accompaniment to this dish. Also, stir-fried, julienned, fresh vegetables.
GeneratedRecipe: cut chicken into bite size pieces. saute shallots and shallots in butter until tender. add chicken and brandy and simmer 5 minutes. remove from heat and add heavy cream and liqueur. bring to a boil. serve with rice.

Ingredients: 3 c. self-rising flour, 6 Tbsp. lard, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/3 to 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. cooked sweet potatoes, mashed
ReferenceRecipe: This was made in the bread tray like regular biscuits, but a regular bowl may be used.
GeneratedRecipe: combine potatoes and sugar. add milk, flour and lard. beat with mixer until smooth. drop by spoonfuls onto greased griddle. cook over medium heat until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) jar apple jelly, 1 (10 oz.) jar pineapple preserves, 1 (5 oz.) jar pure horseradish
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together and refrigerate. Serve with meat.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. serve with crackers or chips.

Ingredients: 1 c. rice, 2 c. water, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Combine rice and water in Pyrex bowl. Cover. Microwave 5 minutes on High. Reduce to medium heat and microwave 13 minutes. Let set for 5 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in heavy saucepan, place the rice and water. bring to a boil. reduce heat and add a little water. cover; simmer for 45 minutes. add salt and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 lb. round steak, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1/2 c. thinly sliced onion, 1 can mushroom soup, 1/2 c. commercial sour cream, 1/3 c. water (more if needed)
ReferenceRecipe: Heat margarine in large skillet over moderately high heat. Add meat and onion; cook until meat is brown and onion is tender. Remove from heat. Add soup, sour cream and water. Stir and place over moderately low heat for about an hour, or until meat is fork-tender. Serve over cooked, lightly buttered noodles or rice.
GeneratedRecipe: in skillet, brown meat in margarine. add onion and cook until tender. stir in soup, water and sour cream. heat through. serve over cooked noodles. serves 4.

Ingredients: 1/2 medium yellow onion, 1 small green pepper, 2 stalks celery, 1 tsp. white pepper, 1 tsp. garlic powder, 1 c. tahini (sesame paste), 3/4 c. fresh lemon juice, 1/2 c. soy oil, 1 c. sesame oil (light colored, not oriental dark colored), 3/4 c. tamari, 1 Tbsp. honey
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in blender or food processor. Blend until smooth. Makes 1 quart. Will keep in refrigerator about 4 weeks.
GeneratedRecipe: cut onion, celery and green pepper into small pieces. mix in tahini, tahini, lemon juice, honey, lemon juice and pepper. add tahini to taste and stir to blend. add oil and blend. add the rest of the tahini mixture, tamari and sesame oil. chill.

Ingredients: 2 lbs. fresh broccoli, trimmed & cut into 1 inch pieces, 1/2 lb. bacon, fried & crumbled, 2 c. (8 oz.) finely shredded Mozzarella cheese, 1/2 red onion, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: In a large bowl, combine broccoli, bacon, onion & cheese. In a separate bowl, combine all dressing ingredients.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together all ingredients. bake in a 350 degree oven for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 (11 oz.) can mandarin oranges, 1 (20 oz.) can chunk pineapple, 1 (3 3/4 oz.) pkg. vanilla instant pudding, 2 bananas, sliced, 1 tsp. rum flavoring (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Drain all fruit. Reserve pineapple juice. Mix pudding, pineapple juice and rum flavoring. Mix in fruits and chill. Add bananas at serving time.
GeneratedRecipe: drain pineapple, reserving juice. mix juice, pudding and rum flavoring and mix with pineapple juice in a small bowl. add fruit, bananas and bananas. chill. serve with ice cream or cool whip. serves 12.

Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, shredded, 2 medium red onions, sliced, 1 to 2 green peppers, sliced, 3 to 4 ribs celery, chopped, 8 oz. water chestnuts, sliced, 10 oz. frozen green peas, uncooked, 2 c. Hellmann's mayonnaise, Romano cheese or Parmesan cheese, 3 eggs, hard-boiled, 4 strips bacon, crumbled, 1 to 2 tomatoes, sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Layer first 6 ingredients in serving bowl in order, beginning with lettuce. Spread mayonnaise over top layer; sprinkle with cheese. Do not stir! Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours. Forty-five minutes before serving, remove from refrigerator and garnish with sliced eggs, bacon and tomatoes. Serves 12 to 14.
GeneratedRecipe: place first 5 ingredients in layers in a 9 x 13-inch glass dish. sprinkle with romano cheese, bacon, water chestnuts, bacon and peas. spread mayonnaise over top. cover and refrigerate overnight or at least 12 hours. toss gently before serving.

Ingredients: 5 C. powdered sugar, 1 C. peanut butter, 2 sticks margarine, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 - 12 oz. pkg. chocolate chips, 1/8 lb. paraffin
ReferenceRecipe: Work together the first four ingredients with hands. Roll into 1/2 inch balls. Let stand in refrigerator overnight. In double boiler, melt chocolate chips and paraffin. Put a toothpick into ball and dip into melted chocolate. Leave top open so it looks like a buckeye.
GeneratedRecipe: mix first 4 ingredients, roll into small balls. melt chocolate chips and paraffin over low heat. dip balls in chocolate and put on wax paper to harden. can keep in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. shortening, 2 medium onions, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 2 Tbsp. chili powder, salt and pepper to taste, 1 Tbsp. prepared mustard, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef, 6 oz. can water, 6 oz. can tomato paste, 4 or 5 wieners, ground
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in a large pan. Simmer until done (thick, about 2 1/2 hours). Put on hot dogs with mustard and onions.
GeneratedRecipe: melt shortening in a large skillet over medium heat. add onions and saute. add meat, stirring until lightly browned. drain off fat. add chili powder, water, mustard, salt, pepper, chili powder, garlic salt and chili powder. bring to a boil. reduce heat; simmer for 20 minutes. add wieners. serve in a chafing dish.

Ingredients: 2 c. dry lima beans, 2 slices Oscar Mayer bacon, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen whole kernel corn, 1/4 lb. (4 oz.) Louis Rich turkey smoked sausage, thinly sliced, 1 onion, chopped, 1 1/2 Tbsp. flour, pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Place beans in a large saucepan. Add enough water to cover; bring to a boil, reduce heat and cook on medium-low for 2 1/2 hours or until tender. Cook bacon in large skillet until crispy. Place bacon on paper towels, reserving drippings in the skillet to be used later; crumble bacon. Add bacon, corn, sausage and onions to beans in saucepan. Reduce heat to low; simmer 1 hour. Stir flour into reserved bacon drippings in skillet. Cook on medium-low heat until bubbly, stirring frequently. Gradually stir in 1 1/2 cups water until mixture boils and thickens, stirring frequently. Add to soup; simmer 30 minutes. Season to taste with pepper. Makes 6 (1 1/2 cup) servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large saucepan, cook bacon until crisp. remove from pan and set aside. reserve 2 tablespoons drippings in pan. cook onion until tender, about 8 minutes. stir in flour and pepper. cook until bubbly and bubbly. gradually stir in flour, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens. gradually stir in sausage, corn and onion. cook until mixture is heated through. stir in beans and bacon. heat through. serve with crumbled bacon. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 1/3 cup flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon soda, 2 tablespoons sugar, 1 egg (beaten), 2/3 cup milk (more if batter is too thick)
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together dry ingredients. Mix egg and milk together. Add dry ingredients, beat until smooth. Hold finger over bottom of funnel. Pour in some batter. Remove finger and let batter drip in a spiral motion in pan filled with 1-inch of hot oil, 375 degrees. Fry until golden brown, turning once. Remove from pan and drain on a paper towel. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve hot.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together dry ingredients. combine milk and egg with liquid mixture. mix with a spoon until moistened. drop onto greased griddle. cook until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) can salmon, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 tsp. grated onion, 1 tsp. horseradish (optional), 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. liquid smoke, 1/2 c. chopped pecans, 3 Tbsp. chopped parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Drain the salmon, removing all the skin and bones. Flake the salmon, then combine with the next 6 ingredients. Mix thoroughly; chill several hours.
GeneratedRecipe: drain salmon, reserving 2 tablespoons juice. combine reserved liquid with the cream cheese, horseradish, salt and liquid smoke; chill until firm. shape into 1 1/2-inches ball. roll in pecans. chill.

Ingredients: 3 qt. salmon berries, 8 1/2 c. sugar, 1 pkg. pectin
ReferenceRecipe: Wash and bring 3-quart berries. Measure sugar into a dry dish. Measure 6 cups of berries into a large kettle. Add pectin and stir well. Bring to a boil. Add measured sugar and mix well. Continue stirring and bring to a full rolling boil. Boil exactly 4 minutes and pour into prepared jars.
GeneratedRecipe: boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. remove from heat. add pectin. skim and add 1 cup sugar. let stand for 10 minutes. add 1/2 cup pectin for 3 cups sugar. boil for 5 minutes. skim foam. remove from heat. add pectin. put in jars and seal. process 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 graham cracker pie crust, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. softened cream cheese, 1/3 c. sugar, 2 tsp. vanilla, 1 (8 oz.) container Cool Whip, thawed, 1 can apple pie filling
ReferenceRecipe: Beat cream cheese until smooth. Beat in sugar and vanilla. Blend in Cool Whip. Pour into crust. Chill until set. Top with pie filling. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until smooth. gradually beat in sugar. blend in whipped topping and vanilla. spoon in crust. chill for 3 hours or until set. top with apple pie filling. garnish as desired.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. River rice, 1 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 qt. milk, 1 egg
ReferenceRecipe: Combine rice and milk; cook over low heat until rice is tender (approximately 40 minutes). Combine remaining ingredients and beat well. Spoon egg mixture slowly into rice mixture and return to heat. When it looks as if it will boil, remove and top with cinnamon.
GeneratedRecipe: cook rice in milk until done. add sugar and vanilla. let simmer for 15 minutes. add egg mixture to egg and cook until thickened. serve hot.

Ingredients: 12 to 14 cooking apples (about 16 c. chopped), 2 c. cider, 2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1/4 tsp. cloves
ReferenceRecipe: Core and chop apples (do not peel). Combine apples and cider in slow cooking crock-pot. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours or until apples are mushy. Puree in food processor. Return mixture to crock-pot. Add sugar, cinnamon and cloves. Cover and cook for 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except cider. cook and stir until sugar dissolves. add apples and cook slowly, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes or until apples are tender. pour into hot jars and seal. makes 6 cups.

Ingredients: 1 chocolate cake, 3 pkg. European style chocolate mousse, 2 pkg. Skor or Heath bars, 1 large bag chopped walnuts, 2 large containers Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Bake and cool chocolate cake. Cut cake into squares and slice squares in half. Prepare chocolate mousse following the package directions. Chop Heath bars into small squares and layer the ingredients in a pan or large bowl in this order: cake, mousse, Heath bars, walnuts and Cool Whip.	Repeat layers until ingredients are used.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare cake as directed on package. prepare mousse according to directions, using the package except substitute only 1 cup of the water for the chocolate mousse. pour half in an oblong pan. cover with the cool whip. crush skor bars. sprinkle over top of the cake. sprinkle with chopped walnuts or crushed heath bars. cover with remaining chocolate shavings, then refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1 c. white corn meal, 1 c. flour, 1 egg, salt and pepper to taste, 1 onion, chopped up, 1 c. cream-style corn
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together. Drop in pan with a little grease like pancakes. Brown on both sides.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together. drop by teaspoon into hot oil. brown on both sides.

Ingredients: 1 (13 oz.) can Milnot, chilled, 1 small pkg. lemon jello, 1 1/4 c. hot water, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 large box vanilla wafers, juice and grated rind of 2 lemons
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve jello in hot water; add sugar, salt, lemon juice and rind. Congeal slightly. Whip Milnot and fold into jello mixture. Cover bottom of glass baking dish with vanilla wafers; fill with jello mixture and cover with wafers. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix jello and hot water. add lemon juice and salt. add to milnot, rind and sugar. let set in refrigerator. whip milnot. whip milnot. add to whipped cream. fold in mixture.

Ingredients: 1 stick margarine, 1 box powdered sugar, 2 c. chopped pecans, 1 can Eagle Brand condensed milk, 1 can Angel Flake coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Pour into 9 x 12-inch pan and chill. Roll into balls, chill again.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together. roll into small balls. refrigerate. dip in chocolate.

Ingredients: 1/2 gal. sweetened prepared tea, 2 c. cranapple juice, 4 pkg. instant apple cider mix
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together in a pot. Bring to a simmer. Wonderful for those winter nights.
GeneratedRecipe: mix and serve with ice cubes. makes approximately 30 servings.

Ingredients: ham slices (according to number of people you have), Swiss cheese, flour, beaten egg, flavored bread crumbs, pinch of oregano, salad oil
ReferenceRecipe: Place slice of Swiss cheese on top of ham slice; roll and secure with toothpick. Roll in flour, then in beaten egg; coat with flavored bread crumbs and oregano. Saute in hot oil approximately 5 minutes each side. May be served with mushroom sauce, mashed potatoes and/or green veggie.
GeneratedRecipe: dip one side of each slice of cheese with flour. roll in flour and fry in a small amount of oil in skillet. when brown, place a slice of ham on top and roll in egg. sprinkle with oregano and oregano.

Ingredients: 2 c. brown sugar, 2 c. corn syrup, 1 1/2 c. peanut butter, 4 c. Rice Krispies, 4 c. corn flakes, 1 c. salted peanuts
ReferenceRecipe: Melt first 3 ingredients in top of double boiler. Add to cereal and peanuts. Spread on large cookie sheet and refrigerate until cold. Cut into squares and cover with Chocolate Icing.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, syrup and 2 cups of peanut butter in saucepan. bring to a boil. remove from heat. stir in rice krispies. press into buttered pan.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 tsp. oregano, crushed, 8 manicotti shells, 1 (8 oz.) can picante sauce, 1/4 c. finely chopped green onion, 1/2 c. shredded Jack cheese, 1 c. refried beans, 1/2 tsp. ground cumin, 1 1/4 c. water, 8 oz. sour cream, 1/4 c. sliced black olives
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ground beef, refried beans, oregano and cumin; mix well. Fill uncooked manicotti shells with meat mixture. Arrange in a 10 x 6 x 2-inch baking dish. Combine water and picante sauce; pour over manicotti shells. Cover with vented plastic wrap. Microcook in a countertop microwave oven on High for 10 minutes, giving dish a half turn once. Using tongs, turn shells over. Microcook, covered, on Medium for 17 to 19 minutes or until pasta is tender, giving dish a half turn once. Combine sour cream, green onion and olives. Spoon down center of casserole; top with cheese. Microcook, uncovered, on High 2 to 3 minutes until cheese melts. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef; drain and set aside. combine refried beans, refried beans, picante sauce, water and cumin. bring to a boil. stir in meat mixture. reduce heat to low; cover and simmer 10 minutes. stir in sour cream. cook 5 minutes. serve over manicotti shells.

Ingredients: 6 c. sugar, 1 qt. vinegar, 1 Tbsp. each: allspice, mustard seed, celery seed, turmeric and cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Slice cucumbers in large plastic dishpan. Salt lightly. Cover with ice and let stand for 2 hours. Rinse and dry on big towels. Pack cucumbers in jars and pour the mixture of sugar, vinegar and spices boiling over them. Seal.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients; simmer for 5 minutes. pour over pickles and let stand in refrigerator for 4 to 6 hours before serving.

Ingredients: 1 lb. large shrimp, 1/2 c. all-purpose flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 c. sliced almonds, 1 large egg, 1/4 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Peel, devein and butterfly 1 pound large shrimp. Combine 1/2 cup all-purpose flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in a large plastic bag. Add shrimp and shake to coat. Sprinkle 1/2 cup sliced almonds in a jelly roll pan.
GeneratedRecipe: wash and clean shrimp, leaving about 1/4-inch shell on the tail. drain. beat shrimp and egg. combine all ingredients except almonds. dip shrimp in milk mixture and then in egg mixture and then in flour mixture, then into milk mixture; fry until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. sugar, 2 or 3 drops vanilla, 3 Tbsp. flour, dab of butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine in a small pan. Stir all of the time while cooking. Boil until thickened, then it is ready to use on cake. Real good on chocolate cake and can be used on other kinds.
GeneratedRecipe: heat milk, sugar and flour until thick. remove from heat and beat into mixture until thick. add vanilla. beat until thick.

Ingredients: 2 parts pears, cut up, 1 part sugar, dash of ground cloves
ReferenceRecipe: Put pears in container. Pour sugar over them and let set overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and quarter pears. mix all ingredients together and cook for 30 minutes. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 2 jars sliced carrots or cook your own, 1 Tbsp. minced dry onion (soaked in water for 5 minutes), 1/3 stick margarine, few shakes garlic powder, 1 tsp. dill weed or to taste, 3 Tbsp. catsup or to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Prepare onion. Saute all ingredients, except carrots. Pour over carrots. Heat all together.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients in saucepan. cook over low heat until carrots are tender.

Ingredients: 2 boxes Little Debbie snack cakes, chocolate, 1/2 gal. ice cream, any flavor, softened, 1 container Cool Whip, chopped nuts, chocolate chips and/or M&M's
ReferenceRecipe: Place Little Debbie snack cakes in bottom of 9 x 11-inch pan. Spoon ice cream over cookies. (Wet clean hands for easier spreading.) Spread Cool Whip over ice cream. Sprinkle nuts, chocolate chips or M&M's on top. Freeze until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: make cakes and place in bottom of large glass bowl. pour chocolate chips over cakes. place cool whip on top of ice cream. add nuts and/or cherries to taste.

Ingredients: 1 c. shredded carrots, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 1/4 c. margarine, 1/4 c. flour, 2 c. milk, 2 c. chicken broth, 1 can tuna, drained, 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire, 1 c. shredded cheese, 1/4 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: In 3-quart pan, cook carrots and onions in margarine until onion is soft, but not brown. Blend in flour. Add milk and broth; cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Stir in tuna, celery seed, Worcestershire and salt. Heat through. Just before serving, add cheese and stir until melted.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine in saucepan. add onion; cook until tender. add flour, salt, worcestershire, chicken broth and chicken broth. cook until thickened. add tuna and vegetables. cook 5 minutes. stir in tuna and cook until heated through.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 16 oz. shredded cheese, 1 pkg. taco seasoning, 1 can chopped green chilies, 1 can (fat free) refried beans, 1 jar salsa, 1 medium onion
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef and onions, drain off fat. Coat with taco seasoning mix. Place in casserole dish. Add rest of ingredients in any order. Bake 40 minutes at 400 degrees or until bubbly.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef; drain off grease. add remaining ingredients. simmer 10 minutes. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 1 qt. milk, 2 c. sugar, 8 oz. can crushed pineapple, juice of 2 lemons
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve sugar in milk by stirring. Add lemon juice and a little rind and pineapple. Pour into ice cream freezer and freeze. May be frozen in refrigerator, if so, stir several times while freezing.
GeneratedRecipe: add milk to the sugar. freeze.

Ingredients: 1 lb. beef round, cut in strips, 1/4 c. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. dry sherry, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1/2 tsp. ginger, 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, cooked rice (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: In small bowl, mix together soy sauce, sherry, sugar, ginger and garlic powder. Stir in meat and let marinate for 10 minutes. Broil 4 inches from heat for 1 to 2 minutes each side or until done as desired. Serve on rice. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ingredients together in a plastic bag; add beef and marinate for 2 hours. cook until done. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 blenderful ice, 1 can frozen limeade, 1 1/2 Tbsp. powdered sugar, 1 can Bacardi light rum*
ReferenceRecipe: *Use empty limeade can.
GeneratedRecipe: * or shake in a blender until smooth.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sausage, browned and drained, 7 slices American cheese, 2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 3 c. Bisquick mix
ReferenceRecipe: Place cooked and crumbled sausage and both cheeses in microwave-safe dish and microwave until cheeses are melted. Stir in Bisquick.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients well. bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 small white potato (large egg size), creamy peanut butter, 4 x powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potato with jacket on. Peel and mash very fine. Add sugar, enough to make a very stiff dough. Roll mixture out and spread with creamy peanut butter. Roll up like a jelly roll. Cool in the refrigerator. Slice to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: boil potato until done. peel and mash. add powdered sugar until smooth with spoon. roll out on floured board and cut into thin slices. roll up like a jelly roll and cut in squares.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. stew beef, 1 1/2 lb. lean pork, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 chicken, 1 (15 oz.) can tomato sauce, 18 oz. barbecue sauce, 1 large onion, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Cook and bone chicken. Cook stew beef and pork until well done (meat will be stringy; add water as needed). Combine beef, pork and chicken in large open pot. Add sauces, onion and ground beef; stir constantly, simmering very slowly, for about 1 hour. Add extra sauce or water, if needed, to keep hash from sticking.
GeneratedRecipe: brown meat and onions. pour off grease. add rest of ingredients and bring to boil. reduce heat and cook until done.

Ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) can peaches (undrained), 1/2 c. Schnapps, 1 c. granulated sugar, 1/4 c. orange juice, 1 box deluxe yellow cake mix, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. instant vanilla pudding mix, 4 eggs, 2/3 c. vegetable oil, 1 c. pureed peach mixture, 3/4 c. pureed peach liquid, 1 1/2 c. confectioners sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Puree the undrained peaches and combine with Schnapps, sugar and orange juice. Store in covered container for 24 hours. Do not stir again.
GeneratedRecipe: grease and flour a 13 x 9-inch pan. in small mixing bowl, combine cake mix, peach juice, eggs, oil and orange juice. beat until well blended. pour over cake.

Ingredients: 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 3/4 c. maple syrup, 2 eggs, 3/4 c. pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Beat together in pan: milk, syrup and eggs. Boil on medium for 5 minutes. Pour in baked pie crust. Chill. Cover with whipped cream and toasted coconut. (Toast coconut in oven with small amount of margarine.)
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs well. add maple syrup and eagle brand milk; mix thoroughly. add pecans. pour into 2 ( 9-inch ) pie shells. cook in microwave on high for 2 minutes until firm. let stand for 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. (2 layer size) yellow, white or devil's food cake mix, 1 envelope Dream Whip Topping mix*, 4 eggs, 1 c. cold tap water
ReferenceRecipe: *Do not whip: use right from envelope.
GeneratedRecipe: * you may substitute 1 cup water for cake mix.

Ingredients: 2 c. cottage cheese, 1 tsp. garlic salt, 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 5 green onions
ReferenceRecipe: Mix thoroughly and serve with raw veggies or chips.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together. serve with chips. yields 1 cup.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger, 16 oz. can stewed tomatoes, 8 oz. can tomato sauce, 2 c. water, 10 oz. pkg. frozen mixed vegetables, 2 potatoes, cubed, 1 envelope onion soup mix, 1 tsp. sugar (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat; pour off fat. Add remaining ingredients. Cook until vegetables are done.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger; drain. add all the ingredients in a large kettle. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender. remove from heat, let stand, covered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Ingredients: 3 small pkg. strawberry jello, 2 c. hot water, 1 can (20 oz.) pineapple, drained, 1 can whole cranberries, 16 oz. frozen strawberries
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in hot water; add strawberries and stir until thawed. add pineapple ( with juice ) and chill.

Though often thrown away because of the prejudice that many people have against wild meat. GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan, combine beans, soup, milk and cheese. cook until cheese is melted. stir in turkey and almonds.
